### Videha — 2016-08-21T16:40:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-199959>

Thought it best i submit a little history for Dr Kruse to peruse if he chooses to.

\*not in proper order, just flowing as i type. (focus & concentration issues also play a role- mind jumps from one topic to another).

Mother developed very severe asthma when i was born ( got told it was my fault apparently-shame & blame from the get-go), she was constantly getting ambulanced off to intensive care, very scary to a small baby, never knowing if mother was going to come back.
On one of her many stays in hospital, she was being given an inter-costal? injection, they ruptured her lung. Ended up in icu again.

She died at the too-young age of 58 from asthma attack leading to fatal heart failure...according to the autopsy report. I found her body stiff & cold, all her blood had pumped to her head & her face was totally black due to slumping over. Worst day of my life....lost my best mate, i was 28 at the time. Anyways enough of that.

Father left when i was only 3. He disowned his own flesh & blood (me) as i was born a girl & he only wanted a boy. He was a heavy smoker, mother didn't smoke but would have been getting 2nd hand smoke. Me also. Have one pic of me as a baby-father had cigarette about 5" from my face.
He died in his 60's from lung cancer.

Mother was slightly overweight,was on a lot of prescription medications, zero tolerance to the hot weather, constantly struggling for breath, had ovarian cysts,had a goitre & most probably a lot of health issues i don't remember. \*will update if,when any more memories surface.

Grandmother died aged 51-53 yrs - i was 2yrs old. Don't know much about her history apart from she was mainly healthy, but suffered from some depression. She was hospitilized for it & treated, with what i do not know. I can only imagine, perhaps drugs & shock treatment in those days?

They decided to do 'exploratory surgery' on her & she died on the table from golden staph.

Sorry i do not have more detail to share- childhood was very painful,hardwork & lonely,looking after a sick mother from the age of about 8yrs. No friends at school,no fun, such a serious life for a little girl.
My only solace was the backyard, i spent any spare time i had out in the elements, playing with earthworms etc & talking to the plants & birds...:
I say ~nature loves you back without a price tag. Thank you Mother Nature, without you i would not still be here.

Got rear-ended whilst waiting at a red light....sustained whiplash injuries x 3 separate car accidents.

Got flung through a windscreen at 18 yrs, sustained facial injuries,damaged teeth, got dumped on side of road to bleed out. Luckily someone found me,took me home,mum cleaned up all the blood,hence hosp did not realize the severity of my injuries. Hosp surgeon said another 2 minutes,would have been dead.
Hosp ordered radiation therapy for my chin, today you can still see the square where they did it. Painkiller medication & mogadon for sleep.

Had ears pinned back as a child, hosp nearly took out my gall bladder by mistake. Luckily i spoke up in time. Both wounds opened up under the bandage, i was in extreme pain, got told...don't worry....when bandages came off both incisions had separated & i now have thick scars which still hurt especially when i wear glasses to read.

My age is 60. Weight 45kg. Small frame, height 5' 3" approx, no excess fat on body, good muscular definition on arms & legs, flat belly.
Find it hard to keep weight on, always on the move, live alone, no male help so am kept buzy maintaining my home,garden & dog & helping others.
Usually have high energy, difficulty going to sleep, staying asleep. Old injuries make sleeping difficult.

Tinnitus 24/7 -365.
No tolerance to the heat nor the cold, noise & bright lights.
Libido....what libido? nope ..zip....no partner at present. Hormones...pretty much none...
Folk always used to think i was 20 yrs younger than my real age. In last few years...aging. Yep i need more sun & DHA & a host of other changes i have learnt from jk so far.

more info..........

\-mother had several miscarriages & stillbirths, drs implanted a hormone pellet made from real sheeps' ovaries into her buttock & as a result i came into the world. Is this why i have always felt like a black sheep in this world LOL \*pardon my odd sense of humor...tis part of my healing regime as i feel laughter is good medicine.

\-I was 3 weeks overdue, mum was very unwell, they induced her & used forceps to get me out. As a result of being overbaked in the womb-she told me i was so ugly, dried up & looked like an old man...that she didn't want me to be seen in public,she also used to strap my protruding ears back with elastoplast under my bonnet. Self esteem issues anyone? sheesh!

\-disturbed a mole whilst drying my back, taken to childrens hosp,admitted immediately,operated on-removed mole & a heap of roots,flesh. ribcage still tender if someone pokes that area. 8-10yrs?

\-broke my own nose with tyre lever trying to change a flat in the rain, whilst then boyfriend watched tv. 21yrs old approx

\-early menopause with very severe hot flushes & night sweats etc-(when my social life, tai chi & yoga all become too hard,couldn't bear being in hot car, still can't tolerate more than 5 mins..no air cond in car)

\-2003- work dr said i had emphysema-consulted my normal gp-ordered chest xray, hosp did xray-7 times same day.. trainee practicing ?

\-recently when i broke foot, hosp asked when last tetanus shot was, said not sure, told them i did not want one, they shoved it into my leg anyways.

\---

postcode 6112 about 48 kilometres from perth city, country style living,lots of greenery. Still too close to the masses for my liking. Very emf sensitive. I get the distinct feeling Jack will tell me to move

Love being outside in my garden soaking up all the wonders of nature, love to work in the rain, getting all dirty in the earth, am in my element when i can do this, makes me happy! Birds visit me & sing with me, especially when i play the flute. No lessons- i just let the flute & my heart flow..lovely,calming,bees buzzing around...such joy!

Summer-now that is a different story, have fair skin, green eyes & a lot of moles all over body, like the warmth but full on 40+ C temps makes me feel like i'm going to spontaneously human combust, i can feel the sun searing into skin, so unfortunately i am unable to function well in the intense heat. Used to have to wear sunglasses but stopped using them, after finding out they caused black mold, it only took about a week for my eyes not to hurt.
Had decent eyesight up until someone gave me a very old computer & since then eyesight has suffered for reading. Using magnifying glasses for comp work with blue light blockers. Very uncomfortable as they slide down my nose & affect my breathing,also hurts my scars on the ear surgery area. Stopped using them for those reasons but since discovering Jack's work- i have been diligent using them.

Concussion when young. \*don't recall what treatment, got taken to hospital- didn't even know my own name.
Severe nosebleeds when child.

Started periods very early, heavy bleeding & bad cramping, losing days from school, mum consulted hosp & doctors, their treatment was the contraceptive pill & also put me on aldactone (yellow pill)
\* suffice to say, i feel this is what most probably wrecked my hormones, given i was so young at the time.

Suffered from hayfever so badly i couldn't function/ was prescribed Polaramine (red pill)

Did parachute jump -wind shear dumped me back on earth-snapped my left foot nearly clean off, requiring orthopaedic surgery, had titanium plates & screws inside ankle for years. 2nd op to remove metal done. Still limp & painful driving manual car. Sometimes pain is so severe i overbalance & usually end up banging elbows on walls...both elbows have tendonitis/tennis elbow,visible bone sticking out.
Was given pain med pethadeine, made me vomit immediately, then stemetil to curb vomitting. Not sure what else i got given.

Just after i recovered from second surgery on ankle,got off crutches,walking normally-a drunk driver went through red light, ended up in hospital again.

A fully laden furniture removalist truck reversed unexpectedly-i got thrown to ground,pinned under back tyre - sustained broken ribs & other damage. One side of my chest is now higher than the other.

Sustained back injuries including soft tissue damage from work accident, had injections in my spine,forced to take anti-depressants,painkiller medication,etc.

Don't recall being sick much as a child,mainly had mishaps,accidents etc. \*My take on that is i felt so unwanted/ unloved that a part of me was trying to check out. Glad i wasn't successful....i want to live~

Recently i broke right foot, twice. Hosp wanted to operate, i said... i don't think so, my body will heal itself,given enough time...& it did. Walking a lot better.

Have always had problems with teeth, still have 3 mercury fillings . Anti-biotics & pain relief meds after having some teeth removed. Didn't want anti-life-biotics,dentist wouldn't work on me so i succumbed. Took pro-biotics after course finished.
Recently i broke a mercury thermometer.

Present day:
I rarely get sick & have managed to get to 60 yrs of age without taking any regular medications in my adult life... developed an aversion to medical drugs & interventions-most prescribed drugs i have had in my younger years my body has reacted badly to. Also i noted with much concern that a lot of folk on meds actually seemed to get worse then die. I also felt that it just not natural to swallow man-made chemicals.

\*No offense intended to anyone, just been my experience that our bodies are self-healing mechanisms which when given the right materials, body KNOWS what to do. Emergencies & broken bones aside.

Dietary-Only cos caroline asked....  Usually a main evening meal, either steamed & raw vegetables, greens, pumpkin, sweet potatoes, salads with either some grass-fed lamb (when budget permits) if not- chicken breast. Organic coconut oil by the spoonful. Went through phase of never eating brekkie (not hungry in morning), then tried to get into breakfast mode-plain oats raw in soaked in water overnight, to which i used to add a protein powder,moringa,spirulina, barley grass, chlorella & wheatgrass, bee-pollen, blueberries, banana & other assorted so-called superfoods. Got me into the good habit of eating breakfast. Then came across d.asprey & discovered BP C with brain octane if i needed to do heavy mental work, or his mct-xct oil, along with grass-fed butter from nz ...love the brew & i find i have no appetite til late afternoon/evening meal time. Been adding collagen to it also.

Nothing out of a package or tin, no bread, no rice, no pasta, no lollies, no sugar, no icecream,no cakes or biscuits, no chips, no takeaways, no sodas or fruit juices, usually only water, sometimes with apple cider vinegar. Green tea, white tea, used to make herbal teas then turn into what i call my medicine smoothie. Used to do a lot of juicing, fruit & vege with herbs & greens, lived on a liquid only diet briefly ( due to teeth loss-couldn't chew) - lost too much weight, looked & felt good though. Got into raw food recipes for awhile-nuts etc. Drink marine phytoplankton in water each morning.
Usually listen to my body & it's reactions & adjust food accordingly. Not that much into eating these days. Go to supermarket & come out with nothing....lol. People call me weird because i don't eat the way they do....lol...they're all sick/on meds & up until recently i have been feeling great,(aside from old injuries) &med-free.
\*\*Been making a lot of changes since finding Jack's blog. Will get this posted first, then later post my changes so far.

Have only visited the dr 3 times since 2008, for blood tests,mole check, breast check, pap. dr has always said my results were good. So merrily sailed along in life.
April 2015- a new friend who had just been in hospital -visited - i got whatever he got in hosp-some sort of bug/virus....unknown. All i know is i got really sick, worse than i have ever felt, thought i wasn't going to make it..nursed myself, got better,friend came back-i got re-infected 6 times in 3 months. I still feel i have something residual as my breathing has been difficult since then,so got a native american flute to assist my lungs/breathing

Recently started feeling bad-not my normal self-heart pounding,rapid pulse, breathless upon dressing, total lack of energy,not been able to do anything physical... i realized it was time to consult a doctor. Went to chemist to check blood pressure & pulse. Bp was normal. Pulse was rapid-was hot day & i had left my water home. Re-did pulse-was ok. I thought possibly adrenals, thyroid & hormones?? Or just over working myself.

August 2016

Visited dr, requested blood work & chest x-ray. He says i have fibromyalgia, pre-diabetes?
Have always had a lot of daily pain, but just put it down to all my previous injuries,so pushed past the pain & did what i needed to do,then suffer the bad days.
Have turned into a recluse, no children,rarely get visitors, no social life, judged as an outcast for not eating 'normal' food, have no tv etc....i don't mind as i love my own company, i have a soulmate big dog, i love to sing,play naf, dance, paint, garden, researching health (not anymore -since finding this fantastic place) though i do still like Daniel Vitalis & his ideas, re-wilding,getting back to nature, medicinal elixirs etc.

Never have felt like i belonged,always felt different but still remain optimistic,happy & love helping others. Just like my mother -who always put others before her own welfare, now i will be focussing on myself for a change.
Now is the time to help myself & start over, new disciplines, new thoughts, new actions= new results.

I am now a convert away from foodie gurus as jack calls them, my top priority now is to put into place what i have learnt so far,soooo much more to learn & act on. Not enough hours in the day, besides i now have seafood to locate, sun to soak up,light bulbs to research etc, stuff to buy, money to manifest etc....lol See, i have to get well so i can do all this amazing stuff. Any help gratefully accepted. Thanks everyone.

Now i am ready & determined to start phase two of my life where i can get to live not just exist, thrive not just survive.
This is my intention~ (been through the mill.........now to tackle the mountain.
I have the xray & bloodtest results... Q- which is best...Post on here or in blood test area or both? Please advise. Thank you

Gosh, been editing this to make this shorter & i must have deleted the paragraph apologizing for the length of this post, getting tired now....always wanted to write a book, so will call this chapter one of my old life....lol

\*I can feel good changes happening within already, even though my actions are baby steps. More in my next log.

### Videha — 2016-08-21T18:04:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-199961>

Already implemented some small but very important changes in my life:

After sizzling my brain up bigtime reading some of Jack's blogs,came to the forum to search for snippets that i could implement straight away! Was feeling a sense of urgency to get started, wasn't getting any replies to my 3 sent emails to 'contact us', thought i may have not made the cut...lol, so decided i would implement what i had learned so far.

My baby steps so far:

Resumed wearing blue light blocking glasses (bought a year or so ago)

Yanked myself off the forum & put myself to bed at 10PM (knew it would take me hours to get to sleep) next night 10.30pm,next night 9.30PM. Unheard of for me (usually have my best creative ideas & energy the later it gets) mother used to say i wouldn't sleep as a baby... poor mum. Yep- i now know all those all-nighters & sleepless nights have done damage.
I own that & am willing to change it, hence my earlier bedtimes.

Going out barefoot in the cold,rainy weather to get as much LIGHT as i can, making sure i go out in whatever sun there has been -not much lately-icky silver whited out skies..grrrr! Way too many planes etc!

Been eating wild caught, salt-free sardines in spring water , with avocado for breakfast instead of my usual BP coffee. That is big! Have never liked seafood-prawns, crays, crabs> yes, smelly fish> no. That is a big goal i am working to change, as Jack has explained the vitalness of DHA.

Went out in cold,rainy,overcast day looking for seafood , first at 3 supermarkets> bought 500gram salmon $13.00AU.Farmed i quess but better than nothing!
Took a totally different route home & just happened to glance at some shops>saw fish place, introduced myself to the owner with a smile & hand shake, told him the story about an amazing neurosurgeon,chatted to him about what does he like, how he does his oysters & fish, actually shocked myself & bought 4 oysters-($8.00 AU) Yikes! He gave me a free lemon too! Bonus~ He told me he eats raw salmon, but has never been brave enough for the raw oyster trip.

So, i overcame a longterm dislike of them, i got them down..Yay! Have only ever tried 1 in my life-raw-swallowed it & immediately it came up back into the ocean lol I quite like smoked oysters, but jack says raw so raw it shall be. Hope you are listening stomach>you have much to adjust to..hehee.

I rang to thank him for his time- told him i will give him all my business, as getting DHA is vital for my healing etc - i encouraged him to try the raw oysters too. I asked him...if i bought a quantity of oysters, could we do a deal pricewise as my budget is usually only about $20 a week for food. He said he would give me a discount...woot! Nothing ventured =nothing gained, glad i asked. So fish source nearly handled. Came home feeling proud that i had gotten some seafood & made what seems to be a very good contact.

That night i plucked up the courage to eat the salmon raw, thin slivers with grated ginger,some garlic, splash of Brain Octane Oil with a salad. Couldn't eat the whole piece of salmon (not used to cold slimy fishy stuff) lol (ate for brekkie next morning) I WILL learn to LOVE seafood! Yes, i am very determined, as i want my vitality & life back. The 2nd night i couldnt face cold raw salmon, so grilled top & bottom only few minutes-really enjoyed that meal. Yes- i realize heating destroys the DHA but better cooked salmon than no dinner. Summer will be easier to face cold raw salmon.

Another big change i have made is- instead of waking up & piling on layers of warm clothes (house is consistently 10-15 degrees celcius) down to 8 C some mornings & evenings... have been going outside, facing east, sun gazing, even when not sunny, eyes watering & wanting to close, started blinking rapidly, persevered each morning. Eyes are adjusting slowly, besides crying is a good release imho.. can't recall whose post it was on forum, but it made me laugh. Someone asked why they cry when sungazing..their reply was i like it.... lol
Low dopamine & the blinking cools the retina to enable more LIGHT in...right? Please correct me if i have it wrong.

Not been very nice weather lately (coming out of winter in Oz) so standing on mother earth with cold, wet feet, exposing myself as much as possible is the complete opposite of what i usually would do, shivering is my new start to the day. I then eat my sardines & avo, the dog gets the juice, scoots the tin all around the yard.Water, water & more water, then back outside whenever the sun shines. back out into sun then back into dark,gloomy cold house, back in sun, all day long. Am starting to get used to the white,cold numb feet, but still have concerns about exposing myself too much, as ido have neighbours who pop their heads over the fence with no warning. Oh well...may adopt the 'new who cares thought' as i know i need to do this.
Tan through bathers on wish-list, after red light & uv globe, Jack's book, seafood & the list goes on. Maybe the universe will shower me with some finances as a reward for my strong intent to do these things? So far i have managed to manifest a free lemon, a good seafood contact, a discount too! Can't hurt to be optimistic imho...

So even though my actions will seem small in the forum's eyes, to me they are all a big win in my new journey back to health.

\*Would like to hear any input on ways to make raw fish more palatable until my tastebuds change. Preferably thngs i can make from scratch-i don't use processed condiments.

So far, i have been feeling more happy ( more dopamine? yes? ) Either way, i feel great about facing new challenges/flipping my behaviours & routines around & having new goals.

Cheers to everyone & i look forward to learning more...........Let the new life begin........

### Videha — 2016-08-22T14:46:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200011>

Update: entire day typing up blood tests, (mag glasses,blue blockers & old scratched sherlock holmes type magnifying glass) LOL dr's printed copy is very light gray & barely visible..computer glitching,still kept going outside to give my sore eyes a break, sucked up what little sun came through on & off amongst the crud in the sky, chilly winds tho---whole body shaking .. am determined to try to get used to bare skin & freezing feet.

@[caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/), Thanks - will be posting results shortly after i finish answering your questions here.

Re: a chequered past...that sounds bad...lol..yep still standing...will not be going out without a very big fight...besides what doesn't kill us only serves to make us stronger, the more hardship comes my way, the tougher i get (not bodily but in my disposition) Mum was the same-on her own with no male help or support- it killed her in the end, she had way too much on her plate.
3 legged stool is great way of remembering the important points.. nope.. i will not be 'running literally' got enough injuries already LOL

### Videha — 2016-08-22T14:51:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200012>

BLOOD TEST RESULTS \*added overlooked important info (under hormone results)

SE-HDL & CHOL fasting: sept 2008 july 2013 aug 2016 Units Reference

Cholesterol 4.6 5.6 High 7.8 High mmol/L <5.5
Triglyceride 0.6 0.6 0.8 mmol/L <1.8
HDL.Chol 1.9 2.2 2.8 mmol/L 1.1 - 3.5
Coronary Risk Ratio 2.4 2.5 2.8 < 3.5
LDL Chol 2.4 3.1 4.6 High mmol/L < 3.5

(Lab comments avail if needed)

### Videha — 2016-08-23T13:16:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200069>

Update: After posting list of blood tests & seeing it all messed up- my bodymind threw me a big curveball, i had intended on posting my thoughts on the blood tests & which tests were causing me concern....didn't get that far. Typing them up was very stressful, no numbers on my old keyboard, glasses were caning my nose & ears...took me all day, when i would've rather been outside.when i finally got to finish it, was very relieved it was done, the instant i saw how it posted, meltdown happened when i thought i would have to re-type it.

Started getting really severe chest pains,shaking etc- immediately realized i had to get offline straight away. Logged off shut down comp, used lavender eo, sat in dark & let myself process. Suddenly my awareness came flooding back to life & i can see very clearly where i have gone wrong & why.

The insights that i got:

The entire month of August has been very full-on for me, usually only leave my home once a week to fetch food, since health took a turn for the worse & i made the hard decision to seek help at gp, i have subjected my body to 2 long drives to consult him to get blood work done, another drive to hosp, 2 more drives to get blood tests, stressing out when i looked at my xrays (saw white spot) stressed out more when i searched white spot on chest xray (cancer) been overdoing it on net trying to figure it all out, not enough sleep, worrying about what blood tests would reveal, way more driving than my body is used to (increases pain), using more money on fuel than my budget allows, entering back into the medical merryground which i have successfully avoided for a long time (apart from getting blood tested), stressing out by having to be in all the environments full of sick patients, all the extra exposure of other mobiles, etc etc.
Then on top of that putting my face on the net has been freaking me out a lot, plus divulging so much personal information.....

All the excitement of finally finding Jack's site & what i KNOW is the information i need to heal, (big thankyou Jack for sharing such valuable information!) stressing when i got no responses to my emails to join (got that handled YAY!) , there is more..... but suffice to say...........when the crunch came last night it was a big wake up call.

I know i had to do all these things to get to the bottom of why my health has tanked, but have paid a heavy price> hence my reaction last night.

Also typing up the journal pulled me out of present time & back into the past, shocked myself at how much the body has endured over the years.
Amazing i am still here....reminds me how even tho the flesh can sometimes be weak, if we never quit, we can overcome a lot.

\*Decisions made:
I HAVE to SLOW DOWN, PACE myself & continue only working on the highest PRIORITY (3 legged stool) & studying Jack's material, figure out some relaxation strategies to lessen my stress levels, stop trying to change everything all at once, RE-FOCUS on what i can do NOW, stop worrying about all the things i have no control over, (i have always gotten distressed about what is happening in the world, be KINDER to myself >STOP pushing myself to the limit trying to absorb too much stuff at one time, schedule in some time where it involves giving to myself first for a change, lessen my energy & time output trying to help others all the time....not easy when one has been trained to serve others before oneself...but i know that is what is needed. i am the one who needs me now!

Progress report:
After allowing myself to re-balance last night,went to bed & finally fell asleep, had a funny dream about a 3 legged stool chasing me LOL..THANKS caroline! ..used to always have very vivid dreams, lately not been getting into rem, so no dreams, i take this as a sign my dopamine is improving.

Woke up to glorious warm sun, beautiful clear sky, (don't see that much here anymore ) it was much appreciated... been pushing myself to not pile on the clothes upon waking - going outside doing new routine in cold, was starting to feel absolutely icy in my core, which was tensing all my muscles up,increasing pain in old injuries etc, so the warmth was great. I felt so much better for it!

Decided to go get seafood & run some important errands, struggled lifting my roller door, car decided to throw a hissy fit... finally got going, was very breathless...went to put my bag on counter, next second i hear this swearing from behind me, rough looking tatooed lady started paying out on me, i said i am not pushing in, still she continued...........

next stop...aldi just opened last week, so went looking for spring water, found the same brand as Caroline uses......grabbed 2 bottles, bit concerned about water in plastic....BPA...... but better than nothing.

Went to new fish place, owner not there - will go back thurs. Last night i put out to the universe, that some financial help would be wonderful..... walking out of the car park, i looked down & found 10 cents....not much....but a start...lol thankyou universe!

Went to get food for dog, 3 new young guys there.....got some interesting reactions there.....am i getting my mojo back?? lol

Made a decision to start wearing my blueblockers in public.... recovering my health is way more important to me than what other's think...
Decided to not replace my bpc brain octane oil & mct xct oil.........will put that money into seafood.
Decided to spend some time pondering what i have that i may be able to trade for seafood, worth a try. Nothing ventured...nothing gained.
DHA top priority..
Last week i bought krill oil after reading somewhere on blog or forum that jk said ok to use it, i figured dha from that would be better than nothing, so spent $30 on some, then found another post saying not to use it, so today i took the unopened packet back, which enabled me to buy salmon. YAY

Lots more .... won't bore you with all the details... \*the meltdown's upside was that i felt my normal way of positivity & trust returning again, meaning i remembered how i used to function....love what & who i am, put out for what i need, take what comes with gratitude, trust that the universe always provides. Will share another story about that topic another time.

(still have lots of pain & worrying about the test results-no feedback so far)....
spent most of the afternoon in the sun
was GOOD day today > sardines,spring water & SUN....HAPPY happy. dopamine must be improving.....

So all in all progress is being made.
Oh & i need to be as loving & gentle,compassionate to MYSELF, as i am to others.....tis my time to shine my light upon myself.
Chapter 3 over & out lol

### Joeakim — 2016-08-23T18:31:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200080>

Trying to absorb, especially if you are like me "johnny come lately" into the group, Jack Kruse's blogs and podcasts is nearly impossible and quite frankly exhausting and stressful. However, I go back to the BIG THINGS which are the 3 legged stool: Sunlight, water and magnetism.

I get the morning sun to reset and restart my bioclocks, drink lots of spring water (make them EZ water) and limit artificial lights whenever possible and blue lights at night. Get the seafood if you can but don't stress by raising the cortisol. Simply do the best you/we can. Exercise if you need to.

My goal is to create as much happy chemicals in my brain, make good decisions, keep away from the hospital unless you work there, and only to see my PCP to keep checking on my wellness by doing labs. Along the way, make impact to those who I love and care for. If you really want to be happy, go make some stranger's day by doing something extra special!
Best of luck and happy trails!

i decided last night to focus on the 3 legged stool as best i can, finding it hard to focus on reading,as i'm getting more anxious daily, been trying to figure out my blood tests myself, dr says all are fine, well imho, he is 'treating the labs & not the patient'...the labs don't look fine to me!
Re: exercise-used to lift weights (had lovely big well-defined muscles on arms & was very strong) guys in the street used to comment on my arms, lol my exercise was hard yakka in yard, until recently when i suddenly started getting very breathless & severe chest pains, now have had to back off anything physical, getting dressed i feel like i am about to have a stroke...........which is worrying me silly.

### Videha — 2016-08-23T21:14:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200094>

update: salmon dinner, bed 10.30pm,still awake 1am, unable to get to sleep, heart rate racing,was feeling really tired -thought i would fall asleep, but didn't, decided to get up, check in here to see if there was any feedback on my blood tests, nothing so far..
Am still feeling very positive about all the new changes, goals & being here, enjoying the interaction with everyone, learning new valuable information- however underneath that surface level, is my deeper reality of> i am feeling really scared about what is happening to me.

\*The breathlessness & chest pains are happening to me even when i am sitting or laying down, not moving, i am not exerting myself at all......very scary! Am used to being pro-active in my health, but this time around feeling like i don't know enough to help myself....since i don't fully understand all the blood work results ..

Thank you to everyone who has interacted with me so far, i look forward to learning & sharing with you all in the future.
Back to bed now, will check tomorrow to see if any feedback. Goodnight all

### Videha — 2016-08-24T21:55:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200148>

update: today i typed up a post,really laid myself bare,speaking my truth as is my way..it was very up & down, covering some questions, some insights, concerns etc,spent a lot of time going over & over it trying to make it shorter as i was feeling that i am being too long winded,which will put people off from reading my posts. People are buzy i know!
I always write from my heart & as my mind downloads to me, don't usually 2nd guess myself either. Or edit myself.

Got it typed up really quickly, felt i should edit it again, blew a lot of time to make sure it wasn't too long.It is still too long, wrote a special someone on here asked what she thought was best,reply pending..since i am so new here i don't know all the rules & regulations, yet!.. decided to hold back on posting it til i heard back, spent some time liking posts i came across & replying on forum, blue light blockers really aggravating my old nose injury - getting a large red painful lump/ bruise on my nose, forum is easier for me to read so spent time there (am finding it more & more difficult to read the blogs with the really long paragraphs & no linespaces,not complaining!) just explaining my truth.not used to having to explain myself either lol i know i should be reading the blog more than the forum, so much there i want to learn...my life depends on it!

felt good went i logged out, very tired after last nights sleepless night... tonight once again lay there from 11am-1.15am still wide awake,wasn't feeling bothered by anything,apart from the not knowing what is going on with my health..

Usually when i have trouble falling asleep it is on increased pain nights or when i'm worrying excessively about something...that i have been trying to resolve... tonight was totally different...sleep is now worse than ever, felt my dopamine has been building up again from my new routine, something is either depleting my dopamine as quickly as i am building it up..or something>my thoughts> blueblockers not blocking enough blue light... himalayan sea salt lamp decided to die on me, had to resort to lamp.
Or the HRT is doing what all pharmaceuticals have done to me in the past (why i have a very hard strict policy of never imbibing any chemical....not natural! causes more imbalance.. i chose to give hrt a trial against my better judgement to see if it would work...... now regretting it... i feel that i should stop using it ( explained that already in blood test results)
i could be wrong but i can feel my system is going up & down, moods too ......... this is not normally how i feel, despite my life being tough, am usually always good natured, not moody or irritable...today when i nearly fell over from being too stiff \*(in unposted post)..i yelled at the dog...i NEVER do that, he is my treasured, loyal companion....so that upsets me... all in all my whole being & disposition is changing...& not for the better...not good! i acknowledge i have had gains but now feel like i am going backwards...spinning out of control is not a feeling i am familiar with......

For a couple of days my sleep was improving (not getting up at 3am) YAY- now 2 nights in a row wide awake now 2.15am!! when i have difficulty getting to sleep, after about 10mins i usually will get up, have a drink of water,chamomile tea-that usually works, now because of my new knowledge re blue light, i've been just laying there which is frustrating.

decided i would get up & post the post after all, pondering maybe that is why i wasn't falling to sleep> so i am taking the risk once again of getting kicked out for yet another looooooooooong post. x2 not going to keep apologizing for my way of expressing myself...also not something i normally do... getting kicked out is the last thing i want...i'm a huge risk taker
Proof> jumping out of perfectly good aeroplane for one....walking across the nullabor alone..LOL so posting both long posts now (to clear my space...& who knows who may benefit from these crappy posts in the future....butt on line & bravery in full swing taking the risk now...if i happen to get bounced out..i will deal with it then. Tho i do feel Dr Kruse is a very kind,loving compassionate man, (can feel it in his energy on the podcasts)who wouldn't do that without a good reason- one never knows what will happen...that's why it's called risk.... LOL ok 2 posts coming up.... thanks everyone who has interacted with me so far,there are some wonderful folk here.... goodnight

### Videha — 2016-08-24T21:59:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200149>

ok here is the one i was stressing about posting.....
yesterday-lifted 15kg bag dogfood into trolley,into car,out of car, partial collapse-getting it into house>severe back pain today..where are all the young strong helpful guys these days?
\-----------

Very rough night, up 6..15am totally debilitated/extremely weak/body stiff,icy hands & feet,barely able to walk, into warm sun, cold wind,dog ran in front of me, nearly fell down ramp,spilt hot drink all over him, sungazed, eyes back to watering again..burst out crying (too much built up pressure/worry etc for entire month ) let tears flow knowing they are a good release & healing..

Called out to mother earth...please help me-help came in the form of realizing i had clean forgotten to add in very important info to journal. Here to do that now..will post in blood tests section above..
Please know... i am not wanting sympathy,pity or any of that type of stuff, rarely talk about my health to anyone-only listed it all down as i was asked to provide context & details in order for Dr Kruse to direct me.

Actions i took to help myself BEFORE i found JK's site.. (when all of a sudden i was starting to not be able to do my daily chores)

\-made list of symptoms/activities that had suddenly become problematic, list of what i thought it could be....adrenals, thyroid,hormonal issues, methyalation issues,metabolic issues, heavy metal toxicity?? gp is ok with me being pro-active in my own health....which is good.
\-chose to seek help/blood tests-made list of tests i thought might give me much needed insight...got knocked back on hs crp, & other's ,been trying to analyze the results myself-getting more confused.

Not too phased about the fibro side of it... (am used to ongoing daily pain & bodily limitations)...

\*\*heart symptoms & pre-diabetes diagnosis concern me the most- no expertise or knowledge in either.

\*\*I do see that Dr K has the answers -am worried my heart is going to do me in before i get a chance to study more..i know ongoing stress & worry exacerbate my condition, feeling totally out of my depth & everything i have tried is not helping.

Gp didn't ask me any questions at all, just looked at blood test results, said they're all fine, your fine! ... said to him-am used to constant pain etc (from all the injuries) but if blood results & chest xray are 'normal' -why am i getting chest pains & breathlessness, his reply -you have Fibromyalgia! ...and are pre-diabetic! He didn't explain what that was,asked what my options were...reply> medication (anti-convulsives,pain meds & anti-depressants) none of which i wish to put into my body-given when i was forced to take anti-deps before,i went downhill fast...he knows i don't do medications & has never pushed me to take anything...(which i greatly appreciate)

Told him i must have had fibro a loooooooong time-but-have never had any heart symptoms, his reply-the heart is a muscle too...i'm still puzzled why heart symptoms are now present.

Dr said u could try HRT to see if u feel any better,putting aside my strong reluctance to take any medication, feeling so desperate to get better,surrendered & thought who knows, it could just be what the body needs...got chest xray ,saw white mass>on net to research> disturbing posts about lung cancer (dad died lung cancer) spent 3 days stressing, got myself together,remembered it could just be residual damage/infection from the 'whatever it was' i came down with from friend who had been in hosp.

Started researching Fibro,lung information-didn't come up with much apart from...no known cause,medication only treatment,blah blah.. decided would have to make own natural treatment plan for myself to deal with pain issues, etc.

Made list of what i thought may help, hawthorne herb for heart, anti-inflammatory items..turmeric etc. Bought hawthorn.
Came across book on healing hormones naturally -blew my food budget on that in the hope it would educate me further & hold the missing pieces i needed. Asked neighbour who has fibro what she does-lots of medications.

\*Found JK's site & felt i had hit the jackpot, intuitively knew the answers i needed were here..tried to join..had no pic,sent 3 emails-no reply, finally found an old usb with a pic,joined,got accepted .Yay!

Stopped all other research on other sites,started reading JK's blog & forum, scouring for things i could do immediately.
Started doing new routine in mornings-sun,water,seafood,researching uv,infra red globes,checking out where to get john ott's book & jk's book,added to my list of important stuff to save up for.
Stopped all my supps-chlorophyll,himalayan sea salt,vit d, selenium-maybe that was a bad call on my part??
Saw Jack say~most with fibro have so much to handle all at once...& a lot just won't do what it takes,that it can take up 2-3 years,i knew i was & still am willing to do whatever it takes to get better!
kept reading,a lot went over my head,continued to look for info i could understand,the importance of light,dha & magnetism started to sink in-been doing that best i can!

I feel i've done a lot to help myself so far,frustrated that i still don't get why the heart/major energy/stamina started overnight suddenly & still happening, given the so-called "normal" test results. Imho the labs parameters are skewed...(no offense intended Dr K
I feel i am falling thru the cracks, along with soooo many others.

\*I realize now that it all comes back to light,dha,magnetism, & that it will be a long hard road,however feeling very scared that if i don't get some guidance soon- i may be heading for a sudden heart attack (like mum)

\*\*Please know that i am very grateful & appreciative for all the very valuable info jk is so lovingly & generously providing, i do completely understand he is a very buzy man & am not expecting anything,nor complaining, would just like gain some insight into why & what i can do, to prevent myself from becoming another statistic.
I want to stay alive as i am fascinated by his teachings & want to really delve deep into studying & learning more.

Have intuited Dr K has the information i require & i am excited to get into his work,my understanding of what i have read so far is small i know-my desire to learn & implement it all is very strong. Have a passion to learn & gain more understanding....however the heart & diabetes worries are starting to override my ability to read,absorb the info.

I feel uncomfortable asking for help..but here goes.....

I need help/advice... please can anyone share any information about how i can deal with this? Anything..feeling very desperate right now, anything that anyone feels may help is greatly appreciated!

My learning here (so far) is very basic..(the importance of the three-legged-stool )still have many questions,things i am unsure about,
didn't want to bother anyone with newbie q's... as i know the info is somewhere on site...finding it & getting through it all with heart pain happening/affecting my focus ..doing the journal/btest post has eaten into my reading time somewhat. ..blueblockers starting to aggravate my nose injury too so able to read less as days go by...going to look to see if i can locate a smaller pair when $ allow.

Q- Maybe i have mistunderstood something important & am doing the morning routine wrong?
Is there any possibility i am doing harm to myself by doing too much too soon?
Giving the body too many changes too soon, especially the additional bareskin cold exposure.

In am-i know i have to gaze to east to re-set circadian clock, in afternoon-been looking at sun also...
do we get enough light via skin alone or do we always have need to be gazing? not getting anything done when outside, so need clarity on this. tried to do some weeding whilst gazing..didn't work too well lol

Still need to learn about all the different light spectrums,timing (should i be avoiding certain times)? Saw somewhere here 8-10am & 12-2pm, does this mean i am supposed to be avoiding the other times? Been going out whenever there is ANY sun.
Yes i have rushed into things a bit,before understanding everything fully...(don't have to speak chinese in order to enjoy chinese food  Thanks Jack- that's a useful one! ..thought i was doing the right thing..perhaps not...

\*\* ? Which blog would be the best to begin to understand this more please? Preferably one with layman's lanquage if possible
\*\* ? Are there any other folk's here who have similar issues> i can search their forum posts.

Re: cold issues..haven't read much about CT yet, what i do know>when i put clothes back on & get a little warmer>i instantly feel way better...hands & feet still icy,all this winter been unable to get bodycore temp up, even when out in sun..been going out in sun whenever possible(before finding this site)

\*usually eat warm evening meals in this cold weather, now thrown a curveball to body....raw cold seafood...chinese medicine>spleen & cold food?

\*\*Is it possible that there are some folk who cold is detrimental for, if they are already unwell?

\*\*\* Tomorrow am going to do an experiment N=1 (sorry-am not intentionally being disobedient)  just feeling way too much pain which is hindering my cognitive abilities & movement > being this cold constantly-even fully rugged up at night is exacerbating pain in all old injuries) & i normally always honor my body's signals- it is screaming at me for some warmth.... when i am too cold & shuddering that is when i tend to stiffen up & fall over......not wanting any more injuries...so owe it to myself to see what happens.

Same for summer-last year spent entire season wrapped in wet towels, the minute i went outside got dizzy,nearly passing out & had to come inside. Since menopause heat has been problematic. 5 mins in non-aircond car-have to pull over.
Thinking that CT may be really useful for me in the hot weather....willing to give it a go for sure....

Have to learn more about melanoma's & skin cancers, the dreaded doughnut hole, do & don'ts etc (have large moles-got told to keep them covered...old school thinking..now am exposing them, getting sore nippies (never seen the sun before) lol, face going red, concerned i could be making things worse (oz situation-melanoma rates etc) don't know much about all that..also had a surgeon tell me a small flat black one i have will kill me & to get it off immediately....i declined....i am still here! I listen to my gut....it said leave it be!

ps- re: the word 'fine'....whenever i hear someone use that term...i hear > F'kd up,insecure,neurotic & emotional........... LOL
Maybe that's was the gp really meant.....lol sorry for swearing....wanted to leave on a happy vibe

\*\*I humbly apologize for the length of my posts & i ask for your patience please.......just 1 tiny lady wanting to save her own life -reaching out for help.
I do feel a lot less stressed after typing this out~so am going to jot worries down in notebook as part of my healing journey so i don't subject you guys to my long ramblings, so sorry, will be more succinct & to the point in my posts.

I can hear you all cheering,mumbling tfft LOL Dog doesn't speak good english so no point talking to him...lol
Thank you everyone~ x

\----------------------
\*nb to me> i AM...WORTHY of the HEALING i DESERVE! Step aside & accept what comes.......Stay STRONG! ....tis always the darkest before the dawn... stay FOCUSSED on the LIGHT.......(within & without) LIGHT will overcome this current darkness you are in..........this too shall pass. fear NOT! Embrace totally my latest piece of furniture...a powerful 3-legged-stool ;

Whoa . I am getting dizzy just reading . Ease up....now ,,,yesterday but definitely tomorrow
There is a list of healers . Follow them in sequence. The first two you can take together. I had a look at your labs and while I am not expert your BUN : Creat ration speaks of dehydration. Sunlight and water ...Your heart will thank you too. Hold still. Rome was not built in a day and neither did you get here in a day. ### Videha — 2016-08-25T11:19:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200172>

N=1 \* a happy positive post for a change~ lol

Just to share some good stuff from today-was outside soaking up some sun/grounding etc, had the thought gosh i am getting so behind with everything here-(since recent change in health), if i don't get well soon, my home is going to be total chaos... all i have been doing lately is standing around doing these new practices... (still weak no strength etc ) am the type that likes to accomplish something every day..never been one to be lazy.. i like to be on the move all the time,sitting hurts. even though i have hardly slept in days.....

today my spirit SOARED....thankyou mother nature... (dopamine must be rising)
also clearing my space by posting my rants...lol really helped me too.

\*i realized i had been so pre-occupied with this site & doing all the right stuff etc to heal myself, that i had not been doing something that i normally would do (something that i am drawn to doing when i feel out of balance)came racing inside, grabbed my favorite bass naf .. back outside. Playing flute ALWAYS re-connects/ calms me, balances me & makes me FEEL so HAPPY! They are so much more than just a musical instrument.......

Being a very considerate neighbour i don't play outside much... today i thought hey...i get to listen to their chainsaws, cutting metal etc & 7 kids outside screaming & yelling at the top of their voices, 1 of them screams the same word over & over & over..& over......1 cries loudly constantly...& so on...all of which aggravates my tinnitus & peaceful space....yep  environment....lol

today i put myself & my health first...i played & played (out of practise & cold hands, still breathless).....kept at it....

I had the 'bestest' time ..yep> i make my own words up too LOL my back up singers arrived> (birds always join in with me, even when i play indoors) 2 butterflies were flying 1" apart from each other circling around & around in a gentle spiraling motion close to me..every time i see 'a pair' of any creature....my thoughts are.. an omen of 'couple' , my heart skips a beat then i think maybe it's 'my time' to for love with someone...forever optimistic...  He is out there somewhere!

Next was a very low flyover large black bird, then another. i burst out laughing... have some some amazing experiences when i was waiting for my flutes to arrive from usa. will share another time...then the bees starting coming closer to me, i adore bees & have a LOT in my yard, i sit about 3" away from the bush they frequent....never been stung...they know i love them!  one bee decided he wanted to get even closer to me & tried to fly into the end of the flute....LOL

A lot of other stuff happened too, suffice to say my time outside was glorious!!........still no physical work done, however i feel i accomplished something....which also makes me happy.... new rule> must make time to play EVERYDAY...no matter what ! ...like i used to~ in other words i have to get back into my usual routine of all the daily healing things i normally do.... & have stopped since i came across JK....that just shows how much i am drawn to jack's work....everything & i mean everything else has been forgotten....LOL
Yet another chore on the 'i will do' list...when time allows...bend time bigtime to fit everything in..............

not going to proof read 4 times....yay! i just made me some time.. bye all ~

### Joeakim — 2016-08-25T16:39:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200189>

@[Videha](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19324/) as you know repetition is mother of all skills. Once you acquire the knowledge, practicing is the key to improvements. Think to improve your practice in some small way leading to mastering it. That is all we can ever do including JK. Work on big things first. What is the big thing? It could have changed but by listening to JK's podcasts, I've gathered the list and I practice them.

This is a copy n paste from my journal:

**"I'm writing down order of importance from JK's podcast at Selfhacked.
1\. Circadian Rhythm
2\. DHA
3\. Limit exposure to Blue light
4\. Water (higher PH if possible and cold to create higher EZ) and lots of it
5\. Sleep (is an outlier since better the circadian rhythm, better the sleep)
6\. Cold Thermogenesis
7\. Reduced physical/psychological stress
8\. Exercise

So how do I go about being in harmony with this list?
1\. Morning sun daily
2\. Eat more fish & oysters...seafood
3\. Turn off all artificial lights if possible, disconnect WiFi and use ethernet connection, use f.lux, wear UVEX (consumer report test shows most block of blue light, wear more clothes to cover the skin when inside, use different lightblubs (red & purple)
4\. Drink spring water preferably higher PH and cold
5\. Get a daytime shift work!!!! So I can sleep deeper and better
6\. Keep doing CT from Face Dunk in ice water + ice water post shower until get the metal tube to submerge full body
7\. Yoga & meditate
8\. Yoga, HIT, or Sprint: Do it outside in the sun or severely limit working out in the gym under blue light

When it comes to food, I need to be thinking; how can I produce more electrons and make them efficient flow to energize my body"

Best wishes!**

### Videha — 2016-08-26T10:29:27+0300

N=1 (slightly modified routine,tweaking to see if body coped better).. a kinder,gentler approach than when i first began! know better=do better
am>warmish sun/chilly wind/cold wet soil..left more skin covered to maintain some warmth whilst gazing/grounding/waited til less chilly wind/more skin exposed/sardines/water/inside when body started tensing up from cold wind (when too cold>body tenses up=more pain/stiffness>affects my mobility=increases risk of more injuries. Inside>when felt more comfortable>back outside more gazing/grounding & repeated... body responded well...felt so much better/

played flute/gazing/spring water= glorious day with creatures/nature, sun>HAPPY!
good results all around imho...body certainly felt much better for not getting too cold..CT not appropriate for me at this point>summer time it may just be what i need to get me through the heat.. need to learn about it FIRST...no more headlong rushing into things i don't fully understand...lol
Dinner salmon
Started donut hole thread-lost focus..moved on. Changed flux settings. NO artificial lights from sundown/multiple collisions with dog & furn=few minor bumps & scratchs (too risky to do this again until i can purchase uv/ir globes...need to learn more first...
feeling good from great day & interaction with other likeminded/supportive folk here
bed 10.30pm \*HUGE>no laying awake for hours & hours.... YAY !
sleep right through til 5.15am up

(not so good stuff) LOBSTER face,painful lump on nose/ears from bblockers .. getting worse...need them on to read...ran out of sardines...found old tin laying around -exp date 2009 could not eat...looking more hideous by the day....lol face serving as a body heater=added bonus
edit..was using a lighter after my tealights died, burnt thumb & singed off half my thumb nail lol all not so good but way better than having artificial light on ...

Taking it easy today>face needs to heal

All in all my tweaks made my day so much happier & body was less stressed=me less stressed=ALL GOOD!
LLL

### Videha — 2016-08-26T19:06:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200279>

been doing the absolute best i can, given my current health/feeling of being on the verge of heart attack, have pushed myself to locate & learn for myself what i need to know, i remember reading a post whilst i was waiting for acceptance to forum that we need to research for ourselves, (already obvious to me) so i had a reticence about bothering anyone with questions... i always do my own research, i dont ever expect anyone to do anything for me..
i am trying to save my own health, my intuition lead me to this amazing site & jk...i had nor have any expectations of anyone here doing anything..

made so many big changes since i got here, learning a lot, giving my all, met some wonderful kind,supportive people..asked a few questions got great answers, more researching,reading,trying to fit in, get to know people, contribute back etc share my story as asked give context etc etc....
yes it has been hard for me, anything hard just shows to me it is worth pursuing for big benefits ensue... i want my health back..i admire Jack for his bravery & putting himself & his work out there... tis a big risk...for sure, risk is good for us....i took the risk of asking a question so i could fix my new 3 legged stool quicker...it still is missing half a leg...so i asked... bad choice it appears... i have been walking on eggshells here, since i was worried i would get kicked out if i broke the rules.. by doing long posts etc.... i have smashed a lot of patterns,behaviours & done everything in my power to fit in, do the practices...etc...all in my log...i feel bad now as i alienated someone by being a noooob beginner...

i have seen many folk ask many questions from many people...is this not what sharing our energies & wisdoms & experiences are for in this forum?
i surely am not whining about the person involved, all i know is i feel energy,where people are coming from etc.. my bodily reaction when i read the post is my problem, my responsibilty & i hold no bad feelings, nor am i wanting to cause any hassles... i do however feel that all my gains i have been striving for, have just gone up in smoke.... yes i have been on a roller coaster...it is very exciting to be learning...my health issues are what i came here to learn about, i didn't come here to be liked, i did want to be accepted & to learn from others etc.....

a beautiful supportive member welcomed me warmly & said if you have any questions...jusk ask...that made me feel it was safe to ask a question
well i did... i got a reply..... the instant i read it i started shaking all over...yes i am fragile right now..my log shows that.. i never wanted to share my life story but knew i had to...so i did...i also usually never discuss my health either...no one gives a damn about my life, i am used to that..
i let go & showed my darkest moments.... like i am sure everyone did at first knowing it would one day maybe help another..
i am very proud of all my gains ... so far.. jack posted no artificial light whatsover...i took that on immediately even though it is making it super hard typing.... posts are taking a long time...i persevered....tonight for eg...i am now way past my new bedtime....from having to light a lighter to see keyboard...would have been much easier to turn on a light... i didn't.... not a quitter... very upset now... for falling into another black hole...
my purpose in writing this is solely to clear my space before i go to bed....otherwise it will play on my mind....

when i am back in balance i will search out whatever questions i have posted & remove them.... midnight & i have broken another rule by staying up to write this........... i am only human............. rant over...... not going to proof read....i need sleep Good night ~

### Sue-UK — 2016-08-31T12:19:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-optimal-goal.18304/post-200560>

Hi Videha

I have very limited vision in one eye, and my night vision is especially compromised. I can't safely do "normal" things even if its not fully dark yet. Done various swaps to red and amber bulbs and covered a torch light with an amber filter etc which allows me to function ..... I also live with other people so when they are around I still get exposed to the more detrimental wavelengths of artificial light after sunset. So after sunset is the time I get most covered up, to stop as much of any artificial light as possible touching my skin surfaces. I use a thin black hat pulled down over my head, (with a cooled gel pack), and my blue blockers.

Great update by the way!

\*Interesting observation>am now craving the days, dreading the nights..i can see i am heading rapidly to>day -live in the outside,heal in red,sleep in dark...my whole routine is changing.. it's challenging but it just makes so much sense now.. thanks Jk.

### Jack Kruse — 2016-08-22T03:29:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-strong-example-of-food-guru-bias.18305/post-199983>

This is posted as a teaching lesson for those who don't know how to decipher papers, data, or opinions on data published. The irony of my critique is that I agree with him on the fact that we should not supplement sunlight with pills, but why I disagree has nothing to with his reasoning in the video. How you frame an idea in question and study the idea determines your beliefs about the topic. Listen carefully to how this researcher adds his own self selection biases in this talk. His premise is that 25 dihydroxy D is "the nutitional marker" for Vitamin D, but is it more accurate to say it is the marker for effective quantum yield of this person's or race's skin? Vitamin D is not a dietary neurohormone. It is made from UVB light quanta. This seems lost on this PhD. Why would you go talking about the nutritional marker aspect of a hormone that is made photosynthetically? He brings up the question of race and location but never realizes how the surface color, skin thickness both affect UVB light penetration or temperature in the skin. Location on the planet and culture also link to exposure of the skin as well. Remember the temperature of the skin is linked to the speed and efficiency of the isomerization step in the skin required from changing the cholesterol back bone to sulfated D3. You realize that color and pigmentation of the skin links to the effective quantum yield of a light reaction. Anyone who studies leafs and photosynthesis knows this but a nutrition researcher causually skips over it? He says his data on black and white adolescent girls "is not controversial". To who? Him or other people who disagree with the premise? Were the girls all in puberty or not? This affect pigmentation and skin thickness. Both would affect your results. Are they dehydrated or not? Menstruating or not? Is this happening at the same time? If not then don't assume the groups are similiar. These were just my observations from the first 1:50. You need to be discerning and do your due diligence on data you hear before you accept the premise of the researcher. Black females not in their native land and not having solar exposure that those environments bring to the skin surface will not have the same solar callus as Africans who do live in those environments. Therefore, even compare US blacks to Somali blacks is FAULTY logic when dealing with a fundamentally non linear apsect of how light effects biology. The physics of the environment dictates the physiology of the organism and this aspect of quantum biology extends to the local patches of the skin on the same person. This explains why his so called paradoxes exist, but he fails to account for them and tries to lead the viewer toward his perspective from the get go. He says at 3:18 the consensus says that white skin evolved as we left the equator. Not according to the data I have read. It is a function of folate protection to maintain fertility inside the tropics. Black skin outside the tropics would make you more fertile and create more growth. Blacks should have less 25(OH)D because they are more efficienct at the isomerization step in D3 formation from 7-D-cholesterol. Fertility can be maintained by sunlight in the anterior pituitary but the solar radiation in the UVA/B range actually curtail serum level sex steroids released by the pituitary by AM frequencies of sunlight. He wants you accept the consensus opinion because he has to make his points, not nature's points. Nature is simple and her ideas are fertile for the possibility life. Be aware of this hidden bias he portrays. His second point about aggregating points of D levels in plasma globally is faulty. It washes out the real quantum effects. He does not even mention mitochondrial haplotype! And WE should expect these differences, but it is clear he does not, because he is ignorant about light! Global data from about 25(OH)D is notoriously innacurate because it does not address how these white and black folks ancestral environments have changed or not changed as time changed during the collection period. Equatorial mtDNA is tightly coupled and European mtDNA is loosely coupled because of light differences. For example, we know that the photoelectric effect is lowered for UVB when a person is located in an environment that provides more signal to noise ratio for any reason. Why do we know this? Because cell membrane oscillation lose electrons and since only UVB light can be assimilated photoelectrically to make 25(OH)D we should expect the result because these two groups have RADICALLY different environmental exposures and radically different mtDNA. Photons can only interact with electrons. This researcher never mentions this lack of control for his points. He never considers the effect of grounding in these groups to see if this could be the CAUSE of what his fancy charts tell him. People inside the tropics rarely wear shoes and those above 50 latitude tend to wear rubber soled shoes. He never considers this, but an electrical and optical engineer would in their studies of a PURELY OPTICAL PHENOMENA. If you look carefully at his graph in problem two you'll notice the lines cross very close to the polar regions. This proves my point that there is a massive effect of grounding he ignores. Why? Magnetic flux is much stronger at a polar region to to the orientation of the magnetic field. It is almost up and down in these regions and the magnetic field is stronger. Grounding therefore might have a huge effect on the system because cells all use light in non linear fashion. Non linear fashion means small effects can lead to large unexpected physiology changes. He whiffs on this. Problem #3: The parathyroid glands are endocrine glands located in your neck near your thyroid glands. Their job is to secrete parathyroid hormone (PTH). PTH regulates serum calcium and phosphate, which in return regulate PTH. Note they react to chemical changes inside the body but its levels is directed by the surface light the eye and skin recieve. Mineral content is a function of the DC electric current in a cell and not their nutritional status. Robert Becker showed us this. People living in high quantum yield environments will have a higher DC electric current which in turn increases the electrostatic bonding of the two copper ions in the P N junction between collagen and bone. His premise for problem three also just blew up at 9:26. He never mentions Becker's work on bone because he doesn't know really how bone works. He is regurgitating what is in the bio-chemistry book. Everything in the biochemistry book never considers the photoelectric effect in the periosteum. In a 24/7 blue lit microwaved world we've created today, osteoporosis manifests in every doctors office who looks for it in the blood and in bone because mitochondria are screaming for calcium ions because they cannot fat burn due to efflux of calcium caused by your technology and communication gear. I guess he did not know blue light ruins the mitochondria in the parathyroid glands because it penetrates so deeply to slow ECT in these tissues? He does know that the neck is exposed to these lights huh? He never touches that variable but goes through a diagram anyone can read in a book. You get these ideas when you do not realize light cause non linear effects and you have no Earthly idea of anything Dr. Doug Wallace published in the last 30 years but you have a good memory for biochemistry books. Otherwise this video is fine.  When he goes to genes and leaves out ANY DISCUSSION on mitochondrial bio-energics I had to turn it off in disgust..........FYI.

So docs will need to be take detailed histories and become like an epidemiologist and look at the zip code for tower data, cell data, and popultion density and layer that all with the person's labs to get a clue about the trend of a loss of charge. The key is if you cannot fat burn you need most protein and fat intake to keep TCA cycling low. When mitochondria are damaged for any physiologic or environmental reason they cannot utilized beta oxidation to burn fat so they have to revert to the older evolutionary pathways in the TCA cycle. This older pathway is OK for simple organism like Bacteria and Archea but it is not good for chronic use in complex eukaryotic cells. If you rely on the TCA cycle for too long it will stimulate cell growth to try to offset the energy deficit. The reason for this is that simple life ability to make energy is limited by the geometry of their cell membranes. So they have to lean heavy on the TCA cycle to make up the energy deficit. When you have no ability to fat burn you become more bacteria like in energy generation because our mitochondria reverts to its ancient bacterial past. This is why the Warburg metabolism occurs. This amount of energy does not allow for FULL CELL function and this is why their disease phenotype manifest because the change in the mitochondria forces epigenetic changes in the nuclear genome to help offset the energy loss.

It is not that hard to see when you understand Dr. Doug Wallace's work. This is why patients with high % heteroplasmy crave carbohydrates and love blue light devices. You need to not allow these things to happen in your local environment because it deepens the "energy deficit" for these people to crawl out of. These two environmental ACTIONS act in unison to keep their gut microbiome simplified and allow for chronic rapid TCA cycling to make energy from carbohydrates. The problem is the longer they stay in this cycle the deeper the mitochondrial defects get the worse their mitochondria get in many tissues. This is why obesity leads to so many other diseases as more mitochondria are mowed down. Fixing neolithic disease is a mitochondrial Rx to regain fat burning, nothing else and nothing more. Blood glutamate and glucose are always raised in these people because glutamate and glucose are part of the TCA being overused because they cannot access beta oxidation of fats. The proof: Studies have shown that increased oxygen consumption and N-acetylglutamate and urea synthesis are coupled to agmatine-induced stimulation of mitochondrial fatty acid oxidation. IMPLICATIONS: So if you cannot use beta oxidation it means glutamate and glucose will rise in the blood plasma. This explains many disease because it is the common pathways seen in altered mitochondrial as laid out by Dr. Doug Wallace's 40 years of work in mitochondrial medicine. ### Jack Kruse — 2017-07-14T03:35:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-strong-example-of-food-guru-bias.18305/post-218760>

Another fail. Carbs consume 3 waters per acetyl group that enters the citric acid cycle, versus 4 for fat. Why is that? Could it be related to the fact that photosynthesis consumes water and puts more hydrogen in carbohydrates and this is why their isotopic fraction of deuterium is higher than fats???? Yep.

How does this water consumption marry to deuterium content of foods and water? Was this ever considered in the discussion on bio-chemical pathways mentioned in the video??? Focus on what matters and not on the pathways that only tell part of the bio-physics of cell. What food guru's never get is water is the medium of energy and information transfer in life. Water transfers electrons and protons for a reason. Water is capable of turning one arrangement or molecule into another which either requires energy release or consumes energy. Beta oxidation creates a massive sea of light hydrogen water in the cytosol and carbohydrates are water neutral for the cytosol. This affects the gravitational force in cells and their viscosity. This viscosity affects how light can operate inside a cell because of Fermat's law. Fat oxidation limits gravitational and viscosity effects (inertia) in cells and carbohydrates dehydrate the cytosol to allow gravity to affect things in the cytosol. Since light under goes graviational lensing this affects photonic signaling in cells. It also affects Fermat's law in cells. Food guru's forget there are 3 different types of pathways in the cell that transfer 3 different sorts of energy transfer. Food guru's alsways make the critical error of focusing in on only one.......the biochemical pathways and they completely ignore the other two.

What are the 3?
A. Mass transfer occurs in metabolic pathways which only transfer bits of molecules.
B. Energy transfer pathways which transfer energy
C. Signal transfer pathways which transfer information in a cell.

Of the 3 the last one is the most important and quantized to light. Most signal transfer pathways remain unmapped, hence why these meme's on biochemical pathways are advanced as something big and important when they discussed out of nature's context. They are not that critical. They are myopic for understanding human diseases and performance. Understanding all three and how they work in unison quantum coherently will make sense of the chaotic activity in biochemical pathways to give scientists and humans a meaningful wisdom of nature on a larger scale. Focusing in on a cell's metabolic pathways and ignoring the other two modes of energy transfer is myopic. We are a metroplis of 100,000 biochemicals working in unison per second and not 35 biochemical highways on a geographic map of biology.

They study it inside and not in the sun!!!! Thyroid stimulus needs AM sunlight to operate. Food has no effect here. And not having a period is a huge issue for oncogenesis. She flubs that one too!!! G: She says a lower IGF-1 is better for cancer patients? Low IGF-1 is associated with lower longevity because of a lack of sun. Way off base here. When I saw this slide I wondered how they asked her to speak. She never once mentions how sunlight lowers insulin levels and changes receptor sensitivity either. Again, every opportunity to mention sunlight, she shows two pictures of animals in nature but never makes the link ONCE. All this in the first 14:00 minutes. H: She talks PCOS and shows a pregnant lady on a dock in the sun? Did she mention the sun in the results? Did she mention any light controls? She says that an increased fertility in these 2 ladies was caused by the diet.........she has no cause to say that but her beliefs about food. I: her high fat/sucrose mouse is a nocturnal mammals so where any of the studies on him controlled for hsi scotopic retina? NOPE. J: She blames the Warburg shift on cancer in the beginning then at the 17:00 min part says cancer cells still make glucose on a ketogenic diet. This is evidence that glucose does not cause cancer. She fails to even see it. I could go on........I want to be clear I use ketosis in cancer patients but I cannot get behind anyone who spews half truths about ketosis. This video is a classic on the meme creation of half truths. So call me a diet/food saboteur, critic, and skeptic.

**Demographics**
As a suburb that is being converted from small farms to residential lots, the population of Piara Waters has grown significantly, from 94 people in 2006 to 2,589 in 2011.[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Piara_Waters,_Western_Australia#cite_note-1) The population is further expected to grow to over 8,000 by around 2021.[\[2\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Piara_Waters,_Western_Australia#cite_note-2) To accommodate this growth, there are three new community and sporting facilities planned for the suburb. Piara Waters Primary School was opened in February 2012, with classes to cater for students from Kindergarten to Year 7. A government high school is planned to open in neighboring [Harrisdale](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harrisdale,_Western_Australia) in 2017.

### JanSz — 2016-09-05T17:21:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/videhas-blood-test-results-cause-for-concern-or-acceptable.18306/post-200914>

> [Videha said:](/goto/post?id=200884)
>
> coming out of winter now-more sun avail. Been sunning daily between 7am-10am & 2pm-sundown, with breaks inside to get stuff done.
> No sunnies, no sunscreen,no windows, feet on bare earth,pavers. Working on getting body used to sun, i burn easily,pacing myself..afternoon sun feels scorching so am finding the afternoons the hardest with the gazing.. i still need to learn more about the oz donut hole issue...

Sunlight have variable light frequency content during the day.
We are mostly concerned with UVb because it is most scarce.
There are also variation per latitude
but
UVb on average is only present within two hours before and after solar noon.
In USA, we have daylight saving time.

Daylight Saving Time (United States) 2016 began at 2:00 AM on
Sunday, March 13
and ends at 2:00 AM on
Sunday, November 6

During daylight saving time clock is pushed one hr ahead.
During daylight saving time UVb is present from 11AM till 3PM

In other times solar time and actual time are close.

From UVa we produce vitamin A (need to eat caretinoid containing food, carrots, peppers, night shades (but skip potatoes or other high GI)
From UVb we produce vitamind D(sulfate) (need to eat sulfur containing food, garlic, onions, leeks)

We also need sunlight to build and constantly reinforce our Circadian rhythm.
Without light our pineal gland produces melatonin.
Among other things, presence of melatonin is suppressive to cortisol.
Ideally you want to be weaken up by raising sun.
Practically,
sleep in (totally) dark room
when getting of the bed look at sun or (blue) light, brighter better

@[Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) just posted September webinar.
I am still in the process of watching it,
but
my short takeout is:
skin cancers are not due to UV exposure
skin cancers are due to man made light (that is devoid of UV and IR)(and is otherwise unbalanced)

People exposed to sunlight are healthy or can be cured from sickness that was caused by lack of light (rickets, tuberculosis...)

Moles, freckles, etc will (definitely) get darker,..... get used to it.

Skin on scrotal area or breasts is different that most of other skin.
It needs sun exposure.

////
