Why do I believe this? Relativity of all things but light only stamped this idea in my mind once I understood why light had to be different for all living things.

A comment on [March 9, 2022](https://optimalklubs.com/quantum-engineering-5-what-is-redox-why-it-matters/) - [QUANTUM ENGINEERING #5: WHAT IS REDOX & WHY IT MATTERS](https://optimalklubs.com/quantum-engineering-5-what-is-redox-why-it-matters/) - Blog

Dr. [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/),

A thousand years on the planet… what could you discover and develop?

I believe we must realize our inter-dependence with a thousand others. Like a [neuron-network](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/is-health-a-supplementation-of-multiple-interventions-or-is-it-wrapped-in-our-human-environment.25380/page-2#post-295973), we must place objectivity as a weight in our collective [neuron-judgement](https://towardsdatascience.com/whats-the-role-of-weights-and-bias-in-a-neural-network-4cf7e9888a0f) without rejecting the individual decisions along the way. It may be just a process of [reevaluating age-old ideas](https://www.scirp.org/journal/paperinformation.aspx?paperid=103636) _(like [relativity](https://beyondmainstream.org/scientist/stephen-crothers/) - [https://vixra.org/pdf/1212.0060v1.pdf](https://vixra.org/pdf/1212.0060v1.pdf))._ Placing these believes in the past may seem like [heresy](https://www.gsjournal.net/Science-Journals/Research%20Papers-Relativity%20Theory/Download/4109) while moving towards what Nature illumines. Is it the difference between: the forest from the trees; chaos from statistical identifiability, or is it our next emerging paradigm of an expanding scientific ratiocination? When examining _a whole of the data-set, providing observational behaviors to the movement through the data-set, we may identify, develop, postulate a “new” model._ My hope is we could then ask better questions like: What is outside our current data-set which influences our understanding of what we presently “can’t see”, however, [it manipulates the data-set we observe](https://aip.scitation.org/doi/10.1063/1.5144449). Speculation and prediction of theoretical outcomes could again guild our “next-steps.”

Looking Forward...
John

### Jack Kruse — 2016-10-16T21:49:34+0300

TODAY'S FACTOID: The last post was on sunlight and D3. So is this one. A recent large human study was initiated in 2010 whose purpose was to assess whether targeting a reduction of systolic blood pressure below 120 mmHg was superior to the current standard of reducing it below 140 mmHg. The study is called the SPRINT study. In 2015 the NEJ published the data. the trial was stopped 3.26 years BEFORE it was completed because people with BP's below 120 mmHg were dying 26% LESS FREQUENTLY than those with BP's above 140mmHg. They quantum take home? Sunlight lowers your BP by activating NO to vasodialate your surface vessels to shunt 40-60% of your blood to be irradiated by sunlight. This means MORE SUN, not less SUN, is the best medical advice for limiting illness. Heart disease is the number one kilelr world wide of humans. This does not square with what you hear from dermatologists and ophthalmologists does it? Who do you think is correct? Nature or the "experts" advice who tell us to avoid sunlight and stay indoors under your "bulletproof man made lights your supplement experts tell you to use in the AM?" The best thing about the study was that 43% of subjects had a LOWER relative risk of cardiovscular death than those whose BP was lowered aggressively with medications. This shows the world, sunlight is the most powerful drug most humans refuse to use because of bad advice they take from their "so called experts."

### brent-next — 2017-04-10T09:54:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/blue-light-increases-your-bp-and-is-deadly.18603/post-212096>

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=202915)
>
> Blue light increases your BP and is deadly

Respectfully, please change the theme of your web site to dramatically reduce the amount of blue on your site. You can't control the world, but you can control the amount of blue on your web site.

Please consider installing a new theme with a LOT less blue.

Yes, programs like f.lux can help, but they are difficult to use and don't work all the time.

### Mountain Man — 2017-04-10T18:17:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/blue-light-increases-your-bp-and-is-deadly.18603/post-212111>

> [brent-next said:](/goto/post?id=212096)
>
> Respectfully, please change the theme of your web site to dramatically reduce the amount of blue on your site. You can't control the world, but you can control the amount of blue on your web site.
>
> Please consider installing a new theme with a LOT less blue.
>
> Yes, programs like f.lux can help, but they are difficult to use and don't work all the time.

If you measure the light spectrum output of an entire computer screen it does not change that much when the color blue is displayed. Most of the blue is from the LED backlighting not from the LCD colors. So changing this website to have less blue would not make any significant difference. You can purchase a special monitor that has the ability to change the LED backlighting with a blue filter. Mine is made by View Sonic and I can adjust the blue LED output to decrease it by as much as 86%. It is interesting that decreasing the blue backlighting does not make the picture look as much different as F.Lux does even though it decreases blue output a lot more. Most of the blue is hidden in the white, gray and other colors and trying to change blue output by changing all those with the LCD is less effective and more noticeable than decreasing the LED blue backlight output. Of course the other option is just wear blue blocking glasses.

# Thread: Thoughts on Hawaii
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/thoughts-on-hawaii.18608/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### kyrakitty — 2016-10-17T07:38:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/thoughts-on-hawaii.18608/post-202956>

I have a friend who lives in Hawaii which is around the 22 latitude but I recall hearing on here in the past that Hawaii is a bad place for optimal health. Could people please share their thoughts on why it's not a healthy place to live even though it is close to the equator? He has 2.5 acres that is left natural. No wifi. No street lights etc.... Thanks for your help.

# Thread: Eating after CT?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-after-ct.18610/>
**Subforum:** Cold Thermogenesis
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### DPH — 2016-10-17T22:47:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-after-ct.18610/post-202991>

Jack wrote in another thread I made: "Never eat post CT. Ruins effect. ". But I never got an answer to the reason as to why. Do anyone know why you should not eat post CT, and does after mean close, as 30 minutes, or for the whole day?
If this is the case do you need to do CT in the evening/night?

### Jack Kruse — 2016-10-18T02:24:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-after-ct.18610/post-203000>

CT sets up flow of protons from WAT to mitochondria to turn into heat to shrink water around mitochondria to improve ECT. Why would you want to stop that by eating more electrons?

DPH this is COMMON SENSE now. Come on.

### DPH — 2016-10-18T21:41:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-after-ct.18610/post-203031>

How long after CT can you eat though?
If I did CT at say 1-2pm, it would be hard to go without eating for the rest of the day. Should you always time your CT sessions for late in the evening or night because of this?

### Jack Kruse — 2016-10-18T21:44:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-after-ct.18610/post-203033>

Any time.......but to answer this you need context.

### DPH — 2016-10-19T08:58:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-after-ct.18610/post-203040>

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=203033)
>
> Any time.......but to answer this you need context.

But how can you do CT in the morning or middle of the day if you can't eat after? Or do you not mean to not eat for the whole day, and if so how long is the window after the CT when you can start to eat again? 30 minutes, 1 hour? 5 hours?
My context for doing CT is not fat loss or any illness. I want to do it for performance and overall health reasons.

"So what could cause an imbalance in this reaction with nitrates? non native EMF. What people do not realize is that when the sun is at a Maunder minimum and sunspot activity is low the Earth is open to cosmic ray barrage and gamma ray barrage.........what happens to the atmosphere at this time? At the Maunder minimum there is less magnetic energies from sun being dumped into space. This allows more cosmic radiation to enter the Earth's Atmosphere. As this happens more clouds form.......when clouds form...........they transfer gamma rays and cosmic rays to the Earth surface by way of water chemistry. This is transferred via the hydrogen bonding network in water.

This means that thunderclouds form due to cosmic radiation and they collect the high energy electrons and photons and they transform it into clouds........This implies clouds can discharge cosmic and gamma rays from space. The most shocking part.........this discharge also emits antimatter in the form of positrons.............

This affects life below. Important for those in Aus. This is how the donut hole impacts you. "

# Thread: Oct is always pink because of breast cancer awareness: Is this wise?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/oct-is-always-pink-because-of-breast-cancer-awareness-is-this-wise.18613/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2016-10-18T03:24:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/oct-is-always-pink-because-of-breast-cancer-awareness-is-this-wise.18613/post-203004>

Making you aware of an illness does nothing to solve it's riddle. This is a coy tact of a paradigm using it to increase utilization by over diagnosing cases. If you buy anything "pink" for breast cancer awareness month in October it just tells me you are not part of my thinking tribe and would rather follow a trend of lemmings off a cliff. If you think a mammogram is helpful, you're also not part of an "evidence based thinking" tribe. Why? Read the link. Mammography uses radiation to detect cancer and if it was sensitive and specific to do its job we should have evidence that it works? Do we have this evidence or do we just have a belief that it helps? [http://www.vox.com/science-and-heal...4/mammography-breast-cancer-research-guidance](http://www.vox.com/science-and-health/2016/10/13/13269164/mammography-breast-cancer-research-guidance) In my house all the female breasts I care about and love gets screened with manual exams and the use of thermography which is safer than using ionizing radiation to screen for cancer. Awareness does not solve diseases, it creates opportunity to wallet biopsy unripe minds. Awareness, alone doesn't enlist change. This is why I stopped joining groups for support of any diseases. All they do is institutionalize you and wallet biopsy you to death with promises of funding for research but they never do. Why? Because without their harvesting of your wallet CONSISTENTLY they would never be allowed to exist. You all have known this; you have to understand why you must change your environment. Then wellness can visit you. Just reconnect with nature and not any awareness group.

I believe your world view has to be structured in principle on some specific doctrine which shapes how you function and view humanity. Embracing QED is akin to wearing steel-toed boots in a ballet-slipper world today. This is not a disadvantage but a deep help. It stops you from being a lemming. You begin to think autonomously. Understanding that life is bigger than your set of challenges will help you overcome obstacles that will come your way from time to time. It's impossible to increase the scope of our worldview when all that we are focused on is ourselves. When 'MY GOALS' become 'OUR GOALS', success follows. Whatever a person's ultimate concern may be, it will have an enormous influence on everything else the person does or believes.

This is why I don't try communicate with folks on their level, I try my best to connect with them on my level. When someone tells me my message is "cryptic" they have alerted me to their own myopic way of thinking tied to how they were told to think by an entrenched paradigm. I pay deep attention to that kind of thinking and I destroy it. I throw them rope and see how the react and then I decide if they are part of the solution or problem and react appropriately. I want to elevate understanding and not sink to a level where a superficial connection is made on social media. I want people who are all in. Connection is empowerment. There is a very real difference between making "contact" and making a “connection” with someone else. Contact may lead to a one-time transaction in an awareness group, whereas, connection always leads to a life-time transformation. When you connect - which "investment" holds potential for the greater return with people? Modern humans make contact through social media. That is not my game. Reality is that humans contain invisible threads to nature and they bind us most strongly to our life. Today, technology allows us to contact many people together, but we are all dying of loneliness, in spite of these contacts. Reconnection to our humanness is the key to survival. Disconnection is the key to destruction. The interesting thing - the same key opens both doors.

### kyrakitty — 2016-10-19T20:48:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/oct-is-always-pink-because-of-breast-cancer-awareness-is-this-wise.18613/post-203062>

Regarding this:

"This is why I don't try communicate with folks on their level, I try my best to connect with them on my level. When someone tells me my message is "cryptic" they have alerted me to their own myopic way of thinking tied to how they were told to think by an entrenched paradigm. I pay deep attention to that kind of thinking and I destroy it. I throw them rope and see how the react and then I decide if they are part of the solution or problem and react appropriately. I want to elevate understanding and not sink to a level where a superficial connection is made on social media. I want people who are all in. Connection is empowerment. There is a very real difference between making "contact" and making a “connection” with someone else. "​

I agree with this and I use a similar kind of screening process. It is difficult to be a leader in a field that is being discovered and shared in real time with so many people wanting to shoot you down and waiting for any opportunity to shoot you down. I am sure that plays a small role in the need for this screening process. Especially when people don't think that you are human and have a heart or feelings which is simply absurd.

I will add also that I am ill and it is hard for me to read things and comprehend them and then apply the information practically. It is hard for me to follow conversations sometimes. Sometimes I can't connect with you on your level because I am simply not smart enough yet to connect the dots because you are much healthier than I am.

So if I am unable to physically/mentally connect with you on your level then I would be labeled as part of the problem? or would I be given the benefit of the doubt that I am temporarily ill and doing everything I can to fix my "dopamine level" and repair my effed up mitochondria?

There are times when direct questions are asked, if a detailed context is provided, a suggestion that doesn't always require reading more blogs and posts is really a gift to help move forward faster to being at your level. Of course the links to other posts and blogs are always appreciated and I always look at them but the reason it is sometimes frustrating is that more often than not the blogs and posts end up confusing me even more than I was before I asked the question.

I am really struggling to stay alive, literally, I am alone with no one but myself to fix serious health issues. I struggle to keep up but I am giving the best that I can to contribute in a positive way. I have applied a lot of what I have learned here. When I first came here on a scale of 1-10... 1 been deathly ill and 10 being perfect health... my health was between a 1 - 2. Now two years later it is between 5-6 and occasionally it drops down to a 4 and that totally stresses me out.

Many treat people who are ill/slow and old like a useless waste of time we are not. And I am not saying that is what you are doing but I have been treated this way the last 6 years since I can't keep up with most people around me. My body looks young, very fit/lean and healthy but I am not yet it is superficial. Nearly everyone I meet dismisses me and bullies me when I can't keep up with them. They just see my physical body and base all their assumptions on one superficial thing like how I look and ignore what I tell them about the chronic issues I experience. Yes I do get it when you say:

"This is why I don't try communicate with folks on their level, I try my best to connect with them on my level. When someone tells me my message is "cryptic" they have alerted me to their own myopic way of thinking tied to how they were told to think by an entrenched paradigm. I pay deep attention to that kind of thinking and I destroy it. I throw them rope and see how the react and then I decide if they are part of the solution or problem and react appropriately. I want to elevate understanding and not sink to a level where a superficial connection is made on social media. I want people who are all in. Connection is empowerment. There is a very real difference between making "contact" and making a “connection” with someone else. "
​

I have to use this exact thinking above with people in my life who can't understand that I am trying to biohack my health so I can be well again. Connecting with people is an investment. Like you I wont go into great details about my health issues & solutions I'm exploring with people if they react in ways that I can see they are going to give me problems, waste huge amounts of my time, and not help with solutions. I don't invest in them because who has time to waste? So, when I read the above, which I have read several times now in a few other posts, I believe I understand where you are coming from and it makes sense.

### JKLearner123 — 2016-10-21T15:44:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/natto.18615/post-203144>

Natto is great for vitamin K2. I see you have listed the product's complete ingredients list. Please note that these ingredients fall in to two categories - the beans, and the sauce. The beans simply contain - Fermented Soy Beans: **Soy** Bean, Bacillus Subtilis var. The sauce contains a long list of things, some of which don't look too healthy. Please also note that \*none\* of the vitamin K2 is found in these sauce(s). It's only found in the fermented soybeans. I would discard the little sachets of sauce, and simply eat the beans only. I occasionally buy natto, and occasionally make natto at home, and I've found the store bought stuff to be of good quality. (It's nice and stringy; the Japanese call this "neba-neba".) You can freeze it, otherwise it will start to go mouldy if kept in the fridge for about 2.5..+ weeks. I like natto mixed in with homemade sauerkraut, homemade mustard (store bought should be just as good), and an avocado!

# Thread: Temporary moving to tropics...escaping the European winter - what to change, what to consider?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/temporary-moving-to-tropics-escaping-the-european-winter-what-to-change-what-to-consider.18617/>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Pebbles — 2016-10-19T14:39:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/temporary-moving-to-tropics-escaping-the-european-winter-what-to-change-what-to-consider.18617/post-203043>

Background: Floxxed 2014 Oct and 2015 March.
During my March-April Sri Lanka vacation - almost 12 hours a day in sun - I had 50% improvement of my hearing damage caused by FQT.
About May-June I had the heavy detox reactions and my sweating returned. During summer spent minimum 6 hours a day in the sun, often 8-10 hours ( naked grounding in my garden - village w 350pers/sqkm, low nnEMF) but no further improvement happened. Even 3 weeks Mediterranean vacation with all day sun+sea was enough only to counteract the nnEMF damage caused by the mobile power tower close to our villa.

Actual status: LBBB, continuous low volume high pitch sizzling still present in my ear, Myoclonus ( Tympani Stapedius, Eustach, Rhino, Palate) getting more rare - even missing for days (Hurray!), EHS is strong ( causing pressure in my head and ears, increasing HBP, lymphedema, dehydration, etc), and still did not start to loose weight (+20kg right after FQT, -7kg down only during 2 weeks water fasting) - latest Somato/thermograph shows still high flairs along ears-nose-sinuses (cipro burned), slight flairs along all tendons and ligaments, and hiatus hernia.

In a few days moving to Sri Lanka, to Kalpitiya and will stay until April-May next year- very low density population, will stay at the beach, at an eco lodge and focusing on my hobbies - swimming with whales.
My sun and grounding satiety will be fulfilled on a daily basis.

As a haplotype- J1B1 and 1/2 mediterranean genes and 1/3 Eastern Eur genes, in perimeno ( thrown due to FQT, at 51yo don't think will be able to turn it back) it will be OK to continue the daily sea-beasts + local seasonal fruits and veggies? Eating morning only will be OK?

As for the flight, beyond full Jet lag RX, should I wear silver anti wave underwear? I know the pros and cons mentioned by DrK in several blogs, webinars and Q&A's, however the trip is 2x 6,5 hours flight. But in 6 hours I am reaching 200/100 HBP due to nnEMF.
Unfortunately Quantlet not arrived yet, I have only Vielight and Valkee available to carry with.

Anything else to take care, take with, etc?

Thanks for inputs!

### kovita — 2016-10-19T15:03:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/temporary-moving-to-tropics-escaping-the-european-winter-what-to-change-what-to-consider.18617/post-203044>

you might see some turn in your menopause, Eniko. Light seems to have capacity to maintain you out of it despite of the first signs. I think you should just do some spiritual exercises before your flight, concentrate on what do you want to achieve during the flight. I am convinced you can manipulate your body with great success in any way if you are connected enough. There are many methods, all of them leading you to the same result.

### kovita — 2016-10-19T15:05:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/temporary-moving-to-tropics-escaping-the-european-winter-what-to-change-what-to-consider.18617/post-203045>

### Mikhail — 2016-10-19T16:58:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/from-russia-with-love.18618/post-203054>

Hi, everyone.

Glad I'm finally here. You know, I seriously need to get better now. For the past two years I was trying to deal with all this by myself, but it just doesn't work out. I'm 27 years old, 5' 8" and 52 kilos. Major digestive issues, low energy, weakness, bad sleep, degrading body composition, non-existent motivation, depression and on and on. Not even sure what exactly the deal is. I'm a big mess.

Hopefully I will find support and understanding here. So, how do I best start?

### Jack Kruse — 2016-10-19T19:16:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/from-russia-with-love.18618/post-203057>

Tell us about your environment, you mother and grandmother's history and what type of technology and light environment you have to endure. I'd recommend you start a journal in the Optimal Journal section.

Welcome

### JanSz — 2016-10-20T01:11:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/from-russia-with-love.18618/post-203070>

> [Mikhail said:](/goto/post?id=203054)
>
> Hi, everyone.
>
> Glad I'm finally here. You know, I seriously need to get better now. For the past two years I was trying to deal with all this by myself, but it just doesn't work out. I'm 27 years old, 5' 8" and 52 kilos. Major digestive issues, low energy, weakness, bad sleep, degrading body composition, non-existent motivation, depression and on and on. Not even sure what exactly the deal is. I'm a big mess.
>
> Hopefully I will find support and understanding here. So, how do I best start?

Hi Mikhail;

Starting with love is a very good first step.
Raise your chin when walking, look ahead not down.
Think good thoughts.

Couple items to work on.
Actually for starters only two.
Light and water.
Water is simple and short,
drink only the best spring water you can find.
Most of your daily water drink cold and not boiled.
Newer drink artificial sodas or any other concoctions.
Coffee and some teas may be exception, but newer add any type of sugar or sweetener.

Light.
We are creatures of light.
Without light we die.
Same as a grass, cover the grass with something so it will not see sunlight, and it will die.
Light is connected with everything, your sleep, weakness, depression, lack of motivation.
Light mostly falls on the ground.
You should spend lots of time being connected to ground, preferably wet.
Lots of skin should be exposed to light, that includes eyes.
Minimal clothes no glasses for maximum possible time (while exposed to sunlight).
Thinking more general, we are talking about
light and lack of light
night and day
both must come at the right time
every time, every day, at the same time day starts and latter night begins
say, if you work night shift, forget about ever getting better
if you do not see (enough) of natural sunlight, you cannot get better

when you say body composition, that sound like a talk of a gymnast or body builder
some of them look good and do great things
but they have one common problem
they spend lots of time indoor, in a gym, ballroom or office
they are missing sunlight
artificial light
is not the same as sunlight
artificial light hurts us
it comes in wrong time and have frequencies that our bodies do not recognize
it took millions of years for our bodies to develop
we cannot change in few years, it would take many many generations to change our bodies,
assuming that it can be done
you are already born, you have your body made expecting certain environment
it is up to you to deliver that environment that your body was build for

All this time it was about proper
Circadian Rhythm.

\-------
There is at least one additional highly important item related to sunlight.
Many people these days have very low vit D.

Supplemental vit d is of questionable help.
May need special UV (ultraviolet) lamp to benefit.
Actually there is two types of beneficial UV and two vitamins that we need.
UVa- makes vitamin A
UVb-makes vitamin D
Assuming that we get exposed to this UVa and UVb lights,
to actually make those vitamins we need food
garlic, onions, MSM to provide sulfur so we can make vid D(sulfate)
and
carrots and peppers to make vit A.

\-----------------------------------------
Some places on earth are missing minerals.
Common missing minerals are
selenium
and
iodine and (potassium iodide)
It is good idea to supplement them
they are need to produce thyroid hormones

You may get locally something similar to this:

\-------------------------------------------------------------
1/day-->Super Selenium Complex, 200 mcg 100 capsules (lef.org)

..........
do not use iodine alone
use Lugol's
it is combination of Iodine + potasium iodide

iodide is halide
it is lots about halides ( good and bad)
the good=iodide
the bad=bromide, fluoride, chloride
watch out for items that have bad halides
flour, spa water have bromide
toothpaste have fluoride
tap water, pool water have chloride

you need excess of iodide to displace undesirable halides.

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Halide](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Halide)

\=================================
Have you been affected by Chernobyl radioactive fallout?
If you did, even little bit,
the radioactive iodine could have messed up your thyroid gland.
That could caused lower thyroid hormone production
less energy
tiredness
One can use thyroid hormones from pigs to get help.
\----------------------------------------------------------------
Post some more what bothers you.
Post what doctor said that is your problem.

Have you been hit in the head, specially where forehead meats nose?
Do you have any tests done?
Scan all of them, complete pages.
Ask printer to convert it to PDF file.
attach that file to your post.

or latitude.

Do swidaniya.

### JanSz — 2016-10-20T01:43:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/from-russia-with-love.18618/post-203071>

Think of animal in the cage in zoo that you have to take care of, to keep it healthy.
More specifically, think of lizard.
They need vit D like people do.

Artificial day = 24hr
day-- 14hrs
night --10hrs
\-----
sleep time-- 8hrs
down time before bed time-- 2hrs
\------
day time you want 10hrs of very bright light and 4hrs less light
\------
Our bodies (and animal bodies)
have two hormones
melatonin--night hormone-- produced by pituitary
cortisol-- day hormone -- produced by adrenals (on top of kidneys)

when we see blue light of frequency 460-480nm
that light goes to pineal gland
and that stop production of melatonin

when melatonin level drops, cortisol raise
see chart in previous post
\--------------------

Conclusion,
if you see that blue light in wrong time, you cannot get healthy
Make sure that you do not use melatonin (or cortisol) as supplements.
Watch what your doctor prescribes, they love to give you script for both.

\-------------------
Blue light in the wrong time hurts us.
We can tolerate blue light in day time (from wakeup till about 2 better 4 hours before bed time.
TV, computer screen, cellular phone screens emit blue light.
Do not use them from 2-4 hrs before bed time till wakeup.
It is ok to use red light to see around.

\--------------------
For animal in cage in ZOO
or for you in a small room
get 2 reptile lights
and one red light fixed and one hand held red light.

Assume sleeping from 10PM - 6AM (8hrs)
wakeup 6AM look for 2-3 minutes at the sun or one of you reptile lights
for 10hrs use two reptile lamps
from 4PM till 6PM use only one reptile lamp
finish last meal 4hrs before bed time 6PM, turn off reptile lamp
6PM start red light
10PM go to bed, switch off red light
use hand held red light on the way to bathroom.

Sleep in completely dark room.
If you cannot sleep, just lay down (in that completely dark room.
Preferably without any alarm clocks, get off the bed at 6AM,
regardless if you sleept enough or still would like to sleep.

////

# Thread: UV-A and far-infrared wavelengths have an energizing or preservative effect On food
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/uv-a-and-far-infrared-wavelengths-have-an-energizing-or-preservative-effect-on-food.18620/>
**Subforum:** Biohacking 101
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### kyrakitty — 2016-10-20T00:53:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/uv-a-and-far-infrared-wavelengths-have-an-energizing-or-preservative-effect-on-food.18620/post-203069>

****The 7 Month Long Cherry Tomato Storage Test:**
**{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

****
A microbiological experiment with cherry tomatoes was done to confirm, more simply, that violet glass better protects the bio-energy of food. As had become clear in the previous study where the herbal samples had been exposed to the sun, the most significant differences were detected when the products were stored in clear glass versus violet glass. Therefore, Dr. Hugo Niggli bought cherry tomatoes and bottled them individually in a clear-glass and violet glass apothecary jar on the 22nd of June 2007. The tomatoes were then stored at room temperature in an apartment.

On the 22nd of December, exactly half a year later, a microbiological change judged as mold was observed in the cherry tomato stored in the clear glass bottle. A month later, after 7 months, on January 21st 2008, the result of this biological experiment was photographed. For this purpose, the cherry tomatoes were taken out of the bottles and the microbiological changes of the tomatoes stored in both bottles were photographed. The cherry tomato stored in violet glass retained its red color and had not dried out, contrary to the tomato stored in clear glass.

[http://www.vitalitygoods.com/science-miron-vitality-glass](http://www.vitalitygoods.com/science-miron-vitality-glass)
**
WHY MIRON JARS?**

_From Dr. Cowan:_ I heard about Miron (or purple jars) years ago but never tried them, mostly because they are very expensive. More recently, I revisited the issue as a way to properly store many of the common foods I use (oils, water, crispy nuts) and found that there are some interesting things about these jars. Normal sunlight consists of three "types" of light, which scientists call UV-A, UV-B and UV-C. UV-B and UV-C stimulate plants to grow, but they also cause decomposition of the plants after they die. UV-A does not provoke the same decomposition, or, at least, it affects decomposition to a much lesser extent. Early research also suggests that UV-A and far-infrared wavelengths have an energizing or preservative effect on whatever it encounters, although this is a very complicated subject. The color and thickness of the Miron jars are intended to screen out as much of the UV-B and UV-C wavelengths as possible, while admitting as much of the UV-A and far-infrared wavelengths as possible. These properties allow for prolonged storage and, possibly, an "energetic" enhancement of the contents of the jar.

### Jack Kruse — 2016-10-20T15:09:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epi-paleo-religion.18623/post-203096>

People just dont get the angles of science.......it is in these shadows where the secrets of nature hide.

Society and health sciences have become so synthetic and artificial that the truth now offends people. The social construction of reality within the scientific group which determines, not only what counts as a "scientific" problem or solution, but also what is accepted by the scientific community as a "fact." In a fake world, this presents a huge problem for patients of modern medicine.

**Each branch of science works within its own particular paradigm. What I am going after assaults many beliefs across many scientific theories. No paradigm should be safe under the inquiry of someone looking for how nature might be at work below our current beliefs and precepts of truth.**

**Science** investigates the natural world, while **religion** deals with the spiritual and supernatural — hence, the two can be complementary. Many **religious** organizations have issued statements declaring that there need not be any conflict between **religious** faith and the **scientific**perspective on evolution. This is where they fit.

The irreconcilable points between the two are :

The important difference between science and religion is that religion comes with ABSOLUTE statements, that neither can be proved or disproved, and science evolves from relative truths and statements, that can be testified and proven false (which means: science has to develop, in order to replace (partly) untrue theories, and replace them with better ones). Science does not claim it has absolute knowledge on anything. Religion claims it has. All scientific theories are in principle disprovable, and in the end all theories will be disproven (at least it can be shown there is a limiiting case in which the theory does not work). Religion can in principle not be disproven. Which does not contribute either to it's proof. It is also unprovable. if something is neither provable nor disprovable, then it is useless. It can only have value to people who prefer to be ignorant, and don't want to get into complicated knowledge, and prefer to believe in something that is disprovable. Science is for people that realize that in order to aquire knowledge, some work (sometimes a LOT) has to be done! And even despite you put in a LOT oif work, someone else my disproof all (or part) of your work! That is : you have to try even harder! Religion is for people who claim to know EVERYTHING ABSOLUTELY ("God created the world", for instance ) without having done any work to get to that opinion, and for which nobody can give any disproof. So it is a very safe position. You don't have to do WORK for entitling yourself an opinion on matters that seem important, and nobovy can force you to do some work for finding a better opinion, cause there lacks the ability to disproof you.

Nothing on this site is absolute and ALL of the theories are testable and falsifiable making them scientific. Prior to Cambrian explosion there is no DHA and not enough oxygen and likely not enough UV light from the sun to act as the photocatalysis in the sea or air so the Epi-paleo Rx could not manifest. After it, it became possible. That is how science works........and not how religion works. Your Dad generalizes his beliefs to deride something he clearly lacks knowledge of because of his cognitive dissonace.

Many people when they first come here feel a bit lost because everything in life appears to be a contradiction? In QED all possibilities exist, therefore there is no contradiction. After you begin to realize the implications of QED and probability built in by Heisenberg Uncertainity principle you begin to understand why these things exist. When there is a lapse in understanding of the implication of the QED mechanisms at play, the unripe mind will default to ad hominem attacks. Understand them and contradictions vanish.

**Epistemology and philosophy is just man's way of connecting the quantum world to something he cannot quite explain well so he use words to convey this information in a way he and only he can understand. That is human reality not nature's only way of coding data. The epistemology of nature is based upon waveforms.**

Both my great-grandmother and grandmother were born and lived most of their lives in rural area of Grodno, Belarus. Lived and worked on a small farm. No technology, no electricity until much later, food was local.

They did not have any serious diseases, although my great-grandmother developed osteoarthritis later in life. When my mother was born, they both moved to Riga, Latvia.

Mother was healthy before conceiving, no TV or any kind of technology usage until later, standard Soviet diet, exercised. Developed breast cancer at 30.

Light.
We are creatures of light.
Without light we die.
Same as a grass, cover the grass with something so it will not see sunlight, and it will die.
Light is connected with everything, your sleep, weakness, depression, lack of motivation.

Minimal clothes no glasses for maximum possible time (while exposed to sunlight).

light and lack of light
night and day
both must come at the right time
every time, every day, at the same time day starts and latter night begins
say, if you work night shift, forget about ever getting better
if you do not see (enough) of natural sunlight, you cannot get better

they spend lots of time indoor, in a gym, ballroom or office
they are missing sunlight
artificial light
is not the same as sunlight
artificial light hurts us
it comes in wrong time and have frequencies that our bodies do not recognize
it took millions of years for our bodies to develop
we cannot change in few years, it would take many many generations to change our bodies,
assuming that it can be done
you are already born, you have your body made expecting certain environment
it is up to you to deliver that environment that your body was build for

All this time it was about proper
Circadian Rhythm.

Our bodies (and animal bodies)
have two hormones
melatonin--night hormone-- produced by pituitary
cortisol-- day hormone -- produced by adrenals (on top of kidneys)

when we see blue light of frequency 460-480nm
that light goes to pineal gland
and that stop production of melatonin

when melatonin level drops, cortisol raise
see chart in previous post
\--------------------

if you see that blue light in wrong time, you cannot get healthy

We can tolerate blue light in day time (from wakeup till about 2 better 4 hours before bed time.
TV, computer screen, cellular phone screens emit blue light.
Do not use them from 2-4 hrs before bed time till wakeup.
It is ok to use red light to see around.

10PM go to bed, switch off red light

\========================================================
**A cross-sectional survey of urinary iodine status in Latvia.
[Medicina (Kaunas).](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/25172607#) 2014;50(2):124-9. doi: 10.1016/j.medici.2014.06.003. Epub 2014 Jun 27.**
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/25172607](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/25172607)

**RESULTS:**
The median creatinine-standardized urinary iodine concentration (UIC) in our study was 107.3μg/g Cr. UIC measurements indicative of mild iodine deficiency were present in 31.6%, moderate deficiency in 11.9% and severe deficiency in 2.8% of the participants. The prevalence of iodine deficiency was the highest in the southeastern region of Latgale and the northeastern region of Vidzeme. The prevalence of **TSH values >5mIU/L** followed a similar pattern. The self-reported prevalence of regular iodized salt consumption was 10.2%. Children from urban schools had a significantly lower UIC than children from rural schools.

**CONCLUSIONS:**
Our findings suggest that although the overall median UIC in Latvian schoolchildren falls within the lower normal range, almost **50% of the schoolchildren are iodine deficient,** especially in urban schools and in the eastern part of Latvia. The absence of a mandatory salt iodization program puts a significant number of children and pregnant women at risk.

Hi Mikhail
As there probably is no sun in Russia right now - we actually have no idea where you live at this point, I would start with face dunks in cold water - like your countrymen in Siberia:
[http://siberiantimes.com/healthandl...the-snow-keeping-kids-healthy-siberian-style/](http://siberiantimes.com/healthandlifestyle/others/news/like-ducks-to-water-in-the-snow-keeping-kids-healthy-siberian-style/)

This gets your energy flowing - I would also be eating coconut oil if I were you - but really, your environment is killing you - the first thing to do is to fix your environment - starting with your laptop - try connecting a normal keyboard to the USB port and mouse to a USB port - don't have the lap top near your body - cell phones in airplane mode - change the wireless router to a wired one with an RJ45 ethernet cable - if you sleep near a wall, move the bed - in fact, experiment where on the bed gives you the most restful sleep - it is critical that you sleep - this is how you repair - for that, you need a pitch black room with no electronics in it - get a batter operated alarm clock -

If you're in an apartment, everyone else's wifi will be contributing to your demise, so if it's possible to move, do so - if you have access to a desktop computer that would also be great -

As far as crappy digestion, you can eat bone broths (stick a chicken in a pot, cover with water and simmer for 2-3 hours) with coconut oil and saurkraut - would be a great move - bugs can't digest fat, so they will die - I would also lose the simple carbohydrates which feed pathogenic bacteria - cabbage is also great -

There is a getting started guide on this site:
[https://www.jackkruse.com/getting-started-guide/](https://www.jackkruse.com/getting-started-guide/)
Also, for EMF mitigation, try this site:
[http://electricsense.com/](http://electricsense.com/)

### Mikhail — 2016-11-27T14:06:11+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mikhails-journal.18625/post-204359>

Hello,

I haven't been posting all this time due to my condition becoming much worse, but I'm re-starting the journal now, because I must figure out what the cause is.

For the past three days I've almost had no sleep at all and it really bothers me. Within about 30 minutes of laying down my heartbeat starts to slow down, to the point where it becomes so weird and irregular with buzzing and twitching muscles and god help me recall what else, it wakes me up terrified.
I can't eat anything, food isn't digesting at all. I've lost a tremendous amount of lean muscle, and there isn't much more to lose, really. I feel extremely dehydrated and can't think clearly, also suffocating a lot, especially from emf exposure. It's just a nightmare. Please, help me change that.

I will start describing my current issues in more detail now, and sorry if I jump back and forth.

Digestion:

Food is not digesting properly and sits in the stomach for ages, giving acid and belching. I don't feel satiated after a meal at all, and tend to overeat. Some days it progresses to binge eating with suffering afterwards. I'm stressed and anxious most of the time.
In 24 months I've had at least 10 attempts to adapt to eating ketogenic diet, but failed all of them. Right now I "survive" on white rice and rice powder in a lot of water, some sweet potato, pumpkin, cauliflower, and small quantities of protein: eggs, meats, offal and some fish, seaweed tea, vegetable and mushroom stock, bone broth.

Solid protein isn't digesting, so I have to blend it to even have a chance at it. Most of the food it the solid state is not digesting for that matter, so unless it's blended I can't eat it. That's the issue that messes up everything. I need to be able to just chew meat and be fine.

Things like mushrooms even when blended wouldn't digest, or perhaps I can tolerate ridiculously small amounts (think 50g), and even that is not a guarantee. I can't eat 95% of vegetables. It's not a big loss, as I kind of hate vegetables, but what is a problem is that I can't digest mushrooms and seaweeds. That needs to be changed.

I have tried to supplement with digestive enzymes and found them to be pretty worthless. Betaine Hcl does help a lot, but whenever I take even 100-200mg it gives me so much acid later on I almost want to die. Same with any acidic thing or supplement: ascorbic acid, malic acid, acetic acid, alcar, nac, coffee. When I take it I get muscle pain in certain areas, and pretty much it messes up my digestion for hours or even days. I have to supplement with sodium bicarbonate to get through, which I hate to do.

I don't believe at this point there's even a single supplement that won't give me some kind of a problem. Here are some of the worst ones.

Vitamin D: gives me anxiety and irregular heartbeat, even when applied topically.
K2: almost the same symptoms, but on a good day I can tolerate some.
Ubiquinol: not digesting at all, gives me acid, and I kind of reject it afterwards, also messes up digestion (tried many brands)
Curcumin: I get unbelievably dehydrated, and also it doesn't completely pass through
Niacin: Anxiety, irregular heartbeat.
Almost all B vitamins except for, maybe, folic acid and B12: Anxiety, fluid retention, issues with digestion.
Iodine: problematic, also.

Bear with me.

Big question for me is why fatty fish, oysters, mussels, CLO, or even omega eggs are not digesting at all. The problem is that whenever I eat DHA, my body is just rejecting it, and/or I get dehydrated. I might be something else, but that's how I feel it. Breaks my heart, you know.

I should also mention that I rarely have appetite, or get hungry, or thirsty. Whenever I feel thirst it's the "bad" one, signaling me the things are really messed up, and at that point I can't rehydrate on anything and suffer until the time I get some right food in. In the past it was even worse: for about 6 months it was a problem I dealt with daily. I have starved and not slept for days, and didn't have energy to even digest anything.

Now it's better, but I can't go without food for more than 6-7 hours, and if I do I feel really dehydrated, (when I drink water it gets worse), heart starts to beat irregularly, total energy loss, anxiety, etc. The problem magnifies when I get outside and do things that require energy. I just can't get anything done, can you imagine that?

After a meal I bloat and start feeling depressed and energy deprived. Even when I have some motivation it vanishes. It seems like the food is robbing me of energy, not giving it.

When I use my laptop for more than 20-30 minutes at a time, or am nearby, I get severely anxious and dehydrated. I can even see my facial skin in the mirror tighten, redden and dry out. Tanning booth makes me anxious, severely dehydrates the skin.
I hate to admit it, but the sun, for some reason, has the same effect. I just feel bad when tanning outside. Why? Also, I get some kind of uncomfortable hot pulses going to my head when in the sun, or in the hot shower.
SolarGlo and RubyLux red lighbulbs actually make things worse for me, also.

Grounding is problematic for some reason. Within 5-20 minutes of connecting, I experience heaviness in chest and stomach, and weird feeling in the area between neck and right shoulder.
Let me ask you this: why can't I ground and what is this pain/feeling? Is this related to some kind of a deficiency? I get this pain from doing strenuous work, or emf exposure (like using the hand blender for 1-2 minutes), or when I feel worn out. I get this several times a day, which bothers me to no end.

[http://www.mayoclinic.org/symptoms/low-potassium/basics/definition/SYM-20050632](http://www.mayoclinic.org/symptoms/low-potassium/basics/definition/SYM-20050632)
Low potassium (hypokalemia)
Causes
Low potassium (hypokalemia) has many causes. The most common cause is excessive potassium loss in urine due to prescription water or fluid pills (diuretics). Vomiting or diarrhea or both can result in excessive potassium loss from the digestive tract. Only rarely is low potassium caused by not getting enough potassium in your diet.

**Causes of potassium loss** leading to low potassium include:

Chronic kidney disease
Diabetic ketoacidosis
Diarrhea (causing anal irritation)
Excessive alcohol use
Excessive laxative use
Excessive sweating
Folic acid deficiency
Prescription water or fluid pills (diuretics) use
Primary aldosteronism
Vomiting
Some antibiotic use
\---------------------------===================================
[https://labtestsonline.org/understanding/analytes/co2/tab/sample/](https://labtestsonline.org/understanding/analytes/co2/tab/sample/)
What is being tested?

Bicarbonate is an electrolyte, a negatively charged ion that is used by the body to help maintain the body's acid-base (pH) balance. It also works with the other electrolytes (sodium, potassium, and chloride) to maintain electrical neutrality at the cellular level. This test measures the total amount of carbon dioxide (CO2) in the blood, which occurs mostly in the form of bicarbonate (HCO3-). The CO2 is mainly a by-product of various metabolic processes.

Measuring bicarbonate as part of an electrolyte or metabolic panel may help diagnose an electrolyte imbalance or acidosis or alkalosis. Acidosis and alkalosis describe the abnormal conditions that result from an imbalance in the pH of the blood caused by an excess of acid or alkali (base). This imbalance is typically caused by some underlying condition or disease.

The lungs and kidneys are the major organs involved in regulating blood pH through the removal of excess bicarbonate.

The lungs flush acid out of the body by exhaling CO2. Raising and lowering the respiratory rate alters the amount of CO2 that is breathed out, and this can affect blood pH within minutes.
The kidneys eliminate acids in the urine and they regulate the concentration of bicarbonate (HCO3-, a base) in blood. Acid-base changes due to increases or decreases in HCO3- concentration occur more slowly than changes in CO2, taking hours or days.

Any disease or condition that affects the lungs, kidneys, metabolism, or breathing has the potential to cause acidosis or alkalosis.

The bicarbonate test gives a healthcare practitioner a rough estimate of a patient's acid-base balance. This is usually sufficient, but measurements of gases dissolved in the blood (blood gases) may be done if more information is needed. Bicarbonate is typically measured along with sodium, potassium, and possibly chloride in an electrolyte panel as it is the balance of these molecules that gives the healthcare practitioner the most information.

Aldosterone & Potassium
One source of potassium regulation is the hormone aldosterone.
Aldosterone signals the kidneys to excrete potassium into the urine.

Aldosterone is produced by adrenal glands, that are sitting on kidneys.
The outer layer, adrenal cortex, produces steroid hormones from cholesterol.
Signals from the blood cause the kidneys to make more or less aldosterone.
\------
Looks to me that you may have too much aldosterone.

Likely better if you just took potassium pill.

I am thinking about how to make you drink less,
and
why you feel that you need that much water
\------------------
Potassium depends on
aldosterone,
insulin,
catecholamines
\---
Catecholamines are derived from the amino acid tyrosine
Included among catecholamines are:
epinephrine (adrenaline),
norepinephrine (noradrenaline), and
dopamine.

### JanSz — 2016-11-27T22:00:34+0200

**Conditions Afflicting Organs: Ileum**
The following conditions are related to the organ: Ileum:

-   [Small intestine cancer](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/s/small_intestine_cancer/intro.htm)
-   [Crohn's disease](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/c/crohns_disease/intro.htm)
-   [Paralytic ileus](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/p/paralytic_ileus/intro.htm)
-   [Celiac disease](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/c/celiac_disease/intro.htm)

**Symptoms Related to Afflictions of: Ileum**
These symptoms are related to afflictions of the organ: Ileum:

-   [Abdominal pain](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/sym/abdominal_pain.htm)
-   [Nausea](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/sym/nausea.htm)
-   [Vomiting](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/sym/vomiting.htm)
-   [Bloody stools](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/sym/bloody_stool.htm)
-   [Diarrhea](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/sym/diarrhea.htm)
-   [Bloating](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/sym/flatulence.htm)
-   [Fever](http://www.rightdiagnosis.com/sym/fever.htm)

Cabbage it absolutely the worst thing for me to eat, it just hangs in the stomach for eternity not digested, and so is coconut oil. Eating a lot of fat doesn't work for me. It either is not digesting, or slows digestion, or gives heaviness and bloating. I try to eat as much as I can tolerate, though. I must go completely ketogenic epi-paleo, but everytime I try, within about a day or two my health and digestion process deteriorates, I get heart palpitations, unbelievable heaviness in stomach, lightheadedness, thirst. Moreover, I can only eat a limited variety of foods, with most of them being semi or not epi-paleo.

If you can't digest fat, try ox bile - also, the h pylori breath test might be a good move... remember, you need zinc, b1 and iodine to make stomach acid.... also, niacin might be good to burn fat - start with the timed release stuff maybe so you don't have a histamine response - that is so not fun -

### JMO — 2016-11-28T03:19:58+0200

I think Paralytic ileum can be associated with low potassium. I've been trying to figure out this mystery I have had for several years. I have had severe gut issues lasting for 6 weeks where I couldn't eat then it would go away. I've had every test possible. It occurred every few years and the last few years I've been able to get rid of it quickly within a couple weeks. I think I may have finally figured out that Im low in Potassium and if I drink coconut juice (I like Brian and Amys lime coconut water) it goes away. I can feel better within a day. Coconut water has a lot of potassium...it quenches the thirst.

### JanSz — 2016-12-02T16:43:11+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mikhails-journal.18625/post-204631>

May want to review actual experience of Fecal microbiota transplantation (FMT)
note:
it actually works,
it helps in relieving acute problems
receiver may acquire problems that donor may have (it is deed more intimate than marrying someone)
good idea to stay away from fat donors
looks like it is good idea to have detailed information about fecal donor
the donation point was in small intestine right behind ileum
reached with colonoscopy type of scope
as far as I can tell, it was just one time donation

I assume
that multiple donation
by mouth (using gel caps)
by rectum (via enema)
should be tried first
since it may be easier to accomplish
and may work just as well without big technology being involved

**\==================================================**
**Weight Gain After Fecal Microbiota Transplantation**
[http://ofid.oxfordjournals.org/content/2/1/ofv004.full](http://ofid.oxfordjournals.org/content/2/1/ofv004.full)
_Clostridium difficile_ infection (CDI) is characterized by a high recurrence rate after treatment.

Fecal microbiota transplantation (FMT) is a promising treatment for recurrent _Clostridium difficile_ infection. We report a case of a woman successfully treated with FMT who developed new-onset obesity after receiving stool from a healthy but overweight donor.

the FMT was performed 2 weeks later via colonoscopy. A total of 600 cc of the suspension of donor stool in sterile water was infused through the colonoscope starting in the terminal ileum. The colon and the terminal ileum appeared normal at the time of the procedure. She improved and did not suffer a further CDI recurrence after FMT.

it is now our policy to use nonobese donors for FMT.

studies have shown that FMT using a frozen inoculum from unrelated donors is effective in treating relapsing CDI \[[3](http://ofid.oxfordjournals.org/content/2/1/ofv004.full#ref-3)\]. In addition, most “professional” stool donors for FMT are selected on the basis of good health, including a normal BMI.

### Liofle123 — 2016-10-20T17:26:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/important-non-oxidized-form-of-copper-not-blue-for-mitchondria-etc.18627/post-203119>

Hey, Krusers. Below this text is a lecture by a copper expert. He explains how this form of copper plays a HUUUGE role in the electron transport chain process. It is super interesting and the guy points out how it is crucial for ATP production. Almost all supplements that have copper in them have the oxidized form (blue). This one is dark oranges - like a copper cup.

Since Dr. Kruse talks about mitochondria and ATP and ETC all the time, I think you would be interested in this. Share your opinions please. I suspect that Standard Process has this type of copper (Copper Liver Chelate is its name) but they don't wanna tell me which form of copper it is. I've asked them 3 times. I asked some of the practitioners that sell their products - again, no answer...

# Thread: My Journal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-journal.18631/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 165
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Michalis — 2016-10-21T17:32:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-journal.18631/post-203156>

Hi All,

I have been a lurker in the forums and listening to Jack's podcasts over and over for more than a year now... Some things really sunk in like the 3 legged stool for example, but others need a lot of work to be understood.

My current environment:

I work in an emf hell hole next to London Bridge station. Recently i moved to a flat and i am surrounded by wifi and there is an antenna mast around 300 meters away from my flat. No visual contact though. I don't use a smartphone and wifi is permanently disabled on my router and laptop. No smart meters in the flat (I refused the "free" upgrade).

Really difficult to move away at the moment , i need to stay to London and keep working so i am exploring options to mitigate the effects of my environment/work until i get a gig somewhere with less population density.

Family:

Mother severely sick : 73 y.o now, Chronic pain, elevated blood sugar , heart disease, attrial fibrilation - tricuspid valve replaced. Really low weight - long story. Nobody seems to want to dig deep to find out why this is happening. Doctors happy with managing the situation only.

My mothers mum was healthy until she developed goiter? - enlarged thyroid. Was operated on and died after the op from bleeding during that night.

Grandma's mum died from old age but severely arthritic.

I had my second knee arthroscopy 2 months ago and i am still recovering from it. The first time was due to a torn meniscus. Arthritis has been developing since so i had a stem cell and micro fracture operation. Hopefully that will work but i am thinking that my environment might be sabotaging the whole thing. If someone has any insight on this please comment.

I cannot work out at the moment due to my operation so i need o go back to the gym gradually. No squat or deadlift for at least 9 moths to a year. The fact that my gym is a blue light "alien" world makes me having second thoughts about going back now. I am thinking of attempting a bodyweight training in the park.

So last week i came back from holidays. I spent 2 weeks in Crete, where i originally come from and i was at the beach every day for a few hours swimming and absorbing the sun. I found out that there are couple of beaches with river estuaries which are really cold so i was going there very often and combining my swimming and sunbathing in the same time introducing myself to proper CT that way. On the CT front I have been only taking cold showers since last March. I have also been eating mostly ketogenic or with low carb spells in general. When i was in Crete i was consuming more carbs due to the sun exposure i had and that it is on a lower latitude.

Before i finish my holiday i did a blood test with the results below.

rT3 : 32.1% \[24.0-39.0\]

Testosterone : 509.00 ng/dL \[249.00-836.00\]
Testosterone Free: 8.95 ng/dL \[ 95.80-18.00\]

Blood Sugar : 92 mg/dL \[60-115\]

Urea: 23mg/dL \[10-50\]
Uric Acid : 5.70 mg/dL \[3.40 - 7.00\]
Creatinine : 0.79 mg/dL \[.5 - 1.40\]

HDL : 62 mg/dL \[35-80\]
LDL : 180 mg/dL \[50-150\]
Triglycerides : 65 mg/dL \[36-165\]

Serum glutamic pyruvic transaminase (SGPT) 40 U/L \[5-40\]
aspartate aminotransferase (AST) (SGOT) 30 U/L \[5-45\]
Alkaline phosphatase (ALP) 152 U/L \[60 -279\]
γ-glutamyltransferase : 11 U/L \[10-45\]

I have used a website to calculate my Urea to Creatinine ratio and comes up as 29.1 which is really high.
Can someone comment on my lab values? Is there anything i need to be looking into?

I was feeling great when i arrived back to London. It has been one week here now, and i feel severely demotivated. Might be all this blue light ?? the only thing that creates a bright light in the tunnel is the idea of a new holiday.. The sun and the sea have a massive impact on me.

> I cannot work out at the moment due to my operation so i need o go back to the gym gradually. No squat or deadlift for at least 9 moths to a year. The fact that my gym is a blue light "alien" world makes me having second thoughts about going back now. I am thinking of attempting a bodyweight training in the park.
>
> So last week i came back from holidays. I spent 2 weeks in Crete, where i originally come from and i was at the beach every day for a few hours swimming and absorbing the sun. I found out that there are couple of beaches with river estuaries which are really cold so i was going there very often and combining my swimming and sunbathing in the same time introducing myself to proper CT that way. On the CT front I have been only taking cold showers since last March. I have also been eating mostly ketogenic or with low carb spells in general. When i was in Crete i was consuming more carbs due to the sun exposure i had and that it is on a lower latitude.
>
> Before i finish my holiday i did a blood test with the results below.
>
>
> rT3 : 32.1% \[24.0-39.0\]
>
> Testosterone : 509.00 ng/dL \[249.00-836.00\]
> Testosterone Free: 8.95 ng/dL \[ 95.80-18.00\]
>
> Blood Sugar : 92 mg/dL \[60-115\]
>
> Urea: 23mg/dL \[10-50\]
> Uric Acid : 5.70 mg/dL \[3.40 - 7.00\]
> Creatinine : 0.79 mg/dL \[.5 - 1.40\]
>
> HDL : 62 mg/dL \[35-80\]
> LDL : 180 mg/dL \[50-150\]
> Triglycerides : 65 mg/dL \[36-165\]
>
> Serum glutamic pyruvic transaminase (SGPT) 40 U/L \[5-40\]
> aspartate aminotransferase (AST) (SGOT) 30 U/L \[5-45\]
> Alkaline phosphatase (ALP) 152 U/L \[60 -279\]
> γ-glutamyltransferase : 11 U/L \[10-45\]
>
> I have used a website to calculate my Urea to Creatinine ratio and comes up as 29.1 which is really high.
> Can someone comment on my lab values? Is there anything i need to be looking into?
>
> I was feeling great when i arrived back to London. It has been one week here now, and i feel severely demotivated. Might be all this blue light ?? the only thing that creates a bright light in the tunnel is the idea of a new holiday.. The sun and the sea have a massive impact on me.

### Michalis — 2017-02-19T13:47:59+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-journal.18631/post-208890>

So i have a family health emergency right now and i have to care for a family member. For the last 3 weeks i haven't had a proper nights sleep. I have been spending the last week in the hospital and taking naps while sitting on the chair. My circadian rhythms are completely screwed up. I took my laptop with me and i use it in the hospital and i can literally feel the wifi as a knife cutting through me. It is an EMF hellhole in the middle of Athens but i dont have a choice, i have to be here. I feel terrible and my knees are killing me. My left knee was operated 8 months (microfracture and stem cells) ago and i feel that the whole ordeal is damaging it.
I am going to be be flying back to another nnEMF hellhole , back home at London in couple of days as my work has been almost done here.
What can i do to mitigate all the damage i have been doing to myself? Will CT be enough ?My laptop is going back to ethernet and my cell phone will be definitely reduced though. I have found and open air pool close to where i live open all year round. Any hacks anyone can suggest? I am a bit lost and the sleep deprivation doesn't help.

### Michalis — 2017-11-27T00:33:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-journal.18631/post-228911>

Weather report: I haven't written for a while , things are not great. Lately I keep thinking i have to move however i got 2 bad knees now which complicates things

The past year has been extremely stressful mentally and physically for me.My knee situation and my mum's sickness has caused an awful lot of stress. Lately i get chest pain often. The doctor thinks it is my high LDL cholesterol. I think it is the stress and keto.
I have also developed ribcage pain, just on the junction of my ribcage, i looked it up and might be costochondritis.. Possibly i overdid it in the gym or bad posture slouching in front of the computer+bad light. So inflammation of the cartilage... Something is way out of order with the cartilage and connective tissue in my body. My mum has extremely painful degenerative arthritis on her spine so obviously i got her mtDNA. My GP thinks i have indigestion, so go figure.

My left knee arthritis is a lot worst now after my arthroscopy.. I think i chose the wrong doctor. My understanding from our meeting back in early 2016 was that he would put stem cells from my hip into my knee joint. The result was that i woke up post-op with a micro-fractured knee condyle and stem cell augmentation. I only found out after the op, nothing was mentioned beforehand...Initially i though it will just heal quickly but that is not the case. That has caused me extreme distress so far. I keep beating myself for my ignorance and not asking the right questions.. Dopamine issue?

I could at least squat and dead-lift before the arthroscopy , i just had discomfort on my knee. Now i cant do anything. Sometimes i feel i have lost everything.My confidence has tanked..I gave up my musical instrument lessons. I have stopped all exercise now , i have far too many injuries of the connective tissue everywhere, my knee arthroscopy created a domino effect, a massive downward spiral.

But i admit, if i had digested Dr Kruse's work and understood things a little bit more in detail earlier on i should have dismissed my orthopedic doctor on the spot. So people take note, if something doesn't go down well trust your gut feeling. Especially if what they say are too good to be true. When i asked him about arthritis and epigenetics he categorically said it is a genetic issue. He dismissed the environmental factor. It is tough to learn like that. Dopamine again?

The bones on the lateral side of the knee must be quite inflamed even though there is good growth of cartilage 16 months post op. I now realize that even if the cartilage regrows arthritis which is the underlying condition is still there..That needs to be addressed first not the cartilage damage.
Is it the heteroplasmy on the affected areas raising and causing all that mess? Is heteroplasmy working in the body as a whole or it could be topical too? Is it the master clock that went cuckoo because EMF and blue light that is throwing out the rest of the clocks causing the issue? How can i tell? I read somewhere that Dr Kruse knee issue has disappeared from the MRI scan after consistent CT. Need to find that blogpost. I might be able to reverse it if i understand more.

The icing on the cake :

Last month i fell of my bike and i partially ruptured my right knee ACL too. The last thing i really want now is another arthroscopy.

I have been thinking to do a Regenexx stem cell protocol for both knees (please comment if you got any feedback on them) , however it seems extremely expensive. I spoke to them already to explore what options i have and they have explained everything to me in detail. I was told am an average candidate for the procedure. If i decide to commit to this financially i need to make sure that i must maximize my stem cell production and change my environment for at least sometime before and after the procedure. It is a lot of money and i have to work a lot for it.
I am scouring the site for information constantly, it is just takes so long to piece this puzzle together. I am sure i have seen a blog post why we deplete out stem cells for various reasons including exercise.

I have been trying CT on and off lately and the temperatures are currently dropping so that is a good thing. I get into the tube and i can stay for 30-45 mins on a temperature ranging 11 to 16 degrees Celsius . I am low carb/keto too. I have introduced a lot of seafood and seaweed. I rarely eat fowl now.
I dont know if i am leptin sensitive/resistant as i cant say from the mirror. I have lost a lot of weight so there is just lose skin with some fat.

I take lugols 5% in the morning without any issues 6-8 drops. (Loaded with Selenium for sometime, now i eat brzil nuts) I supplement Mg, Vit C, occasionally K+ (remnant from my introduction to keto, i think i dont really need it any more) and i think i will get into curcumin and resveratrol for arthritis however i dont know if resveratrol is a good idea without sunshine. I rarely drink alcohol nowdays and only socially. I used to be a party animal , not any more. I try to drink a lot of water and herbal teas however coffee is my weak spot. I know it is dehydrating but i find it difficult to kick the habit. I have tried twice to go cold turkey but the withdrawal was brutal. I just could not believe it. Need to work on this.

I am thinking to incorporate long term fasting for a while to promote autophagy and mitophagy and then at some point after a few months take a trip to the tropics get a lot of sunshine , swim ,ground and eat local grown carbs to give the spark to my mitochondria to regenerate. My understanding is that this will promote redox, healing and will reduce inflammation. Any fallacies in my thinking?

I have tried fasting and usually i give up on day 3 or 4. It is really hard and people dont help when they dangle donuts in front of my face at work. (which i don't touch)

I ordered a 23andme test to get some more info on my haplotype. I come from the Mediterranean island of Crete and living in London must be a huge mismatch. For years i was living in Edinburgh , Scotland not exactly the definition of optimal but i will find out when the test will be done. I could easily go back to Crete but not on a city on the island. The south of the island is pretty good i believe but needs testing before. Lots of shipping routes, tourism in the summer and military activity. Also given the economic climate it is pretty tough now.

I will get some labs done based on what i read on the blog on the next few days to get an idea how things are going and will post here as well
In the meantime feel free to comment. The road is steep.

At the airport, off to Thailand for a month. Finally booked it as i am feeling i am breaking down in London. 1 month of sunshine. My previous trip there was 3 years ago... I felt really alive the time i spent over there. I hope to get that feeling back under the strong sunshine.
